clean_body: When you’re trying to build wealth, having a financial advisor in your corner to help guide your decisions could be a good idea. 5 Signs It Could Be Time to Fire Your Advisor When you're trying to build wealth, having a in your corner to help guide your decisions could be a good idea. Unfortunately, some advisors may not have your best interests in mind. So what do you do when you and your advisor are no longer on the same page? Why Work With an Advisor? A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a hypothetical $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3 simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors that serve your area, legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an advisor for a free retirement consultation. Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process. 5 Signs It Could Be Time to Fire Your Advisor If you've been with your advisor for a while and you're thinking about making a change, here are five signs it's finally time to fire your financial advisor - and a simple way to find a new one. 1\. They Are Not a Fiduciary By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person's best interest. This obligation helps limit conflict of interest concerns and can help make an advisor's advice more trustworthy. If you're working with an advisor who is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, they could be receiving a commission for selling those products. If you're experiencing this, it could be time to find a fiduciary advisor who has your best interest in mind. You can get matched with up to three fiduciary advisors who serve your area by . 2\. They Dismiss Your Input People hire a financial advisor to tap into the advisor's knowledge and expertise. But that doesn't mean a financial advisor should assume free rein over your investments. They should absolutely be responsive to your feedback. 3\. They 're Difficult to Reach A good financial advisor will have a steady base of clients, so they're bound to be busy. But being too busy to take your phone calls or schedule regular check-ins can be a big problem, especially in a volatile market. You should be able to get your advisor on the phone if you have a question about your investments or want to change strategies. Getting the run-around could result in losses if you can't keep lines of communication open. 4\. They Don 't Give You the Details Whether you're investing $5,000 or $500,000, you want to know how well your investments are doing. If your advisor's not forthcoming about the status of your assets, you should be suspicious as to why they're so tight-lipped. Likewise, if they're giving you the numbers without explaining what it all means, that can be equally problematic. 5\. They Don 't Take the Time to Get to Know You A financial advisor's role is to evaluate your financial situation and based on your income, family size, investment goals, current assets and risk tolerance. Likewise, if they're giving you the numbers without explaining what it all means, that can be equally problematic. How to Find an Advisor With Your Best Interests in Mind If any of the above scenarios describe your current situation, it could be time to find a new financial advisor - a fiduciary. Not sure where to start? We created a to help Americans find vetted, fiduciary financial advisors who serve their area. This quiz asks you a few questions, then matches you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors. You even earn a free consultation with each of your matches, so you can compare them and be fully prepared to pick a financial advisor. This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice or financial advice (Other than referrals to Investment Advisers or Investment Adviser Representatives). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who is fully aware of your individual circumstances. name: Mary Margaret Dunn
subject: My son is facing life in prison for protecting the community
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4mf5a4uaqbbrv1ndjq9cq7mdvme4fh5pn57ep1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zua7s6t7osrv38960sdkt8d7deqp1h7f24g949c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zspu3qarhu6j8nbl5do515bqdejj8nmme2bqvb5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1veihs6ttiq0mpgk9ikcf6llltdba5d8grd8c40_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs7lsj4k6nvpfehi5349v5jq0bk1v9ip0o3k24ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5tio08akrgderuevcpa4icf1iebaumpnro6cp7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z19mgqeoaq8j1cfiads0f8pchqflrv3i96d49g68_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhbpnal42kloqst3f079c9n4ejssqh92ns3n5bag_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z394dr3nn7m72k53c80ticp2nnofijo204lpppp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z58v5ijvk3ol9ekflv33d0funr9d0prnp9tp9bj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zivk4g0riprgkpl0ap65t4md959qdm54fna2hjt8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmsnh8f8ed5eish7k77d74tk1k979u0tv6onqh9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Candace Owens
subject: Do you know what month it is?
body:
Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who have changed the world for the better.

Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07762%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BZn%2beqI1RC55Li92%2b7LPvA&sysid=1)

Friend,

It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better.

It’s nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don’t want a Black History Month, and I can’t say “why” better than Morgan Freeman did:

_“You're going to relegate my history to a month?**Black history is American history.** ”_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that’s pushed today_ -- I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07763%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b3IUfwurUHUkzWzrijHkSQ&sysid=1)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That’s why I hope you’ll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07764%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zxujgImSE9s1C8cf%2fBYeJg&sysid=1)

Here’s how we’re reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT’s Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT’s five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07775%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I9li8PnPGuAdDpZ3RtMYFw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07776%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9wN%2bVL%2b5zMq%2f7r24Ld0GWg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07777%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LW1PkBkTzmxYteF9raibQQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07778%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ed3PKgAx05Jmsk87uV%2bZbw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07779%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VFP6u33jEe%2bKe0xjfj4qiQ&sysid=1)

clean_body: Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who have changed the world for the better. Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better. Friend, It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn’t about celebrating the Black men and women who’ve changed the world for the better. It’s nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don’t want a Black History Month, and I can’t say “why” better than Morgan Freeman did: “You're going to relegate my history to a month?Black history is American history. ” My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that’s pushed today -- I’ve set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That’s why I hope you’ll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here’s how we’re reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT’s Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT’s five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We Cannot Afford A Special Election Nightmare That Allows Kevin McCarthy To Keep His Current Majority.
body:
Special election in 3 days
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ba465dd-ab9d-4b6a-a0cb-6b4a7e9dc707/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, _As we've written the past few weeks, we have a golden opportunity--really, a necessity--to shave a seat off of Kevin McCarthy's majority in the House. _ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, for her to win this race on Tuesday,_** **_fight for all we hold dear in DC & strike another blow vs Kevin McCarthy, taking a seat from his already-thin majority?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te10a378b-0a58-44f9-9139-763c83b690ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**In only 3 days(!) there's a special election for an open seat in Virginia to determine if we send an incredibly talented & experienced Democrat, Jennifer McClellan, to Washington. Or a MAGA Republican who refused to accept President Biden's victory, or his own loss in his election!!**_ **But we must continue to support McClellan! As she just shared in an email:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61062a17-47d6-4481-a717-82dec8ded4fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Like she did there,_** **_in Congress she'll champion working families and women's rights, and she'll fight GOP white nationalism as the first Black woman elected to this seat. Ever._** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in rushing McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, for her to win this race on Tuesday,_** **_fight for all we hold dear in DC & strike another blow vs Kevin McCarthy, taking a seat from his already-thin majority?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2325b4b-2bd4-46a2-9a7d-047f20082580/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you folks. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57e1893e-e352-4224-984e-414ea5cc3ec4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Pete Sepp
subject: It’s time to stomp the breaks on reckless spending
body:
And now it’s at the limit, with Secretary of the Treasury Janet Yellen stating that unless Congress increases

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07783%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z8g%2bYJ3Q7nDryeHFGGOAvg&sysid=1)
**National Debt:

$31,552,713,460,426**

Friend,

And now it’s at the limit, with Secretary of the Treasury Janet Yellen stating that unless Congress increases or suspends the national debt limit, this will _**“cause irreparable harm to the U.S. economy, the livelihoods of all Americans, and global financial stability."**_ The “extraordinary measures” the Treasury is now taking to keep meeting legal obligations can only last so long.

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union (NTU), and we are the voice for taxpayers in D.C.

The battle is underway in Congress.

**Congress HAS to cut spending and balance the budget.** If you ran a business like Congress runs the government, you’d be constantly on the edge of financial ruin.

It’s time to hold Congress accountable for how they spend YOUR tax dollars, Friend.

That’s why NTU is working with members of Congress to push favorable reforms through to get America back on track. To keep pressure on Congress, I need to raise $25,000 by the end of the week to keep our teams in D.C. working hard for you, and for future generations.

[_**Can I count on you to send an urgent donation of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today? Click here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07784%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gfxTQHPnAydJ8DzLWNkUiA&sysid=1)

**How did the national debt get so out of control?**
* Soaring U.S. spending, with no cuts in less important programs
* A federal budget that largely runs on autopilot
* A decade of Congress cheating the Budget Control Act caps
* Congressional budget gimmicks that appear to reduce deficits but do not actually represent necessary spending and budget reforms
* A completely broken budget process in Congress that serves taxpayers poorly each and every year

Congress is **recklessly** driving our nation into extreme debt - we need to tell them to STOMP the brakes on runaway spending now.

[_**Can you help us push for budget reform in Congress by sending a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount you can generously afford? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07795%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1N1lY0y%2bxlRTNe%2bEfPsNpw&sysid=1)

The current state of America’s debt and deficits illustrates that Congress’s addiction to overspending has made the country less safe, secure, and stable.

We need lawmakers to take even modest steps toward more sustainable debt levels. This is where NTU plays a critical role.

Special interests have their lobbyists. But who is working for you, Friend, the taxpayer? We are -- the National Taxpayers Union.

**Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades:**

* We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986.
* We championed the cause for a “Taxpayer Bill of Rights” in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act.
* In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform.
* In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court.
* We’ve even been able to push back against tens of billions in additional federal spending hikes - but we have a LONG way to go on that front.

Friend, can you help me reach my goal of $25,000 by the end of the week to keep our teams in D.C. to keep pressure on Congress?

[_**Rush $5 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07796%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l7zC%2bEppLw0P4rjV10b3MQ&sysid=1)
[_**Rush $25 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07797%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0gfbUAdbn0BNjDp8sK5o2g&sysid=1)
[_**Rush $50 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07798%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aF09oLl2ex35NURDkkelCQ&sysid=1)
[_**Rush $100 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07799%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R7i8chB9RNKJuL%2bFscZ7Jw&sysid=1)
[_**Rush $250 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07790%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RspkJN4z4u5z5aAMG%2by7ZQ&sysid=1)
[_**Rush $500 >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07791%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Oo7fhy7LMhhf2ZsIFVt%2fw&sysid=1)
[_**Rush Any Amount >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c07792%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ns16r%2fr4ykTBxalmcl%2bFXg&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Pete Sepp
President
National Taxpayers Union

_NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels._

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7025%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=kqabmilgkKmJezl9ri0S5A&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7025%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=kqabmilgkKmJezl9ri0S5A&sysid=1)

But who is working for you, Friend, the taxpayer? We are -- the National Taxpayers Union. Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades: We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a “Taxpayer Bill of Rights” in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform. In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court. We’ve even been able to push back against tens of billions in additional federal spending hikes - but we have a LONG way to go on that front. Friend, can you help me reach my goal of $25,000 by the end of the week to keep our teams in D.C. to keep pressure on Congress? Thank you, Pete Sepp President National Taxpayers Union NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Harmeet Doillon
subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjdjl7uv9dcshc8iupr8sji2548fc99qqe02usr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31cph2bs)

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”

---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmd7bfanigjpn9og2agqtecbm7v409lbcijf14kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31cph2bs) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zib1adsfl7hs9pposlus5errn19lqs9cpa8rkvo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31cph2bs) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zs3focsaser28f79rg628fd2a2lmdgct38g741j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31cph2bs)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6kao9ffumco1qd9iep4alkhmgnqch9het2s0qu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31cph2bs) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsl2jijf4hsup7co0dhhc3jbanjsomodol061vr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o31cph2bs)

body:
Let’s set the record straight.

| |
---
| | | Let’s set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump’s supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people’s House.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: The truth
body:
[](http://trk.tedcruz.) Fellow American, **You can always count on me to speak the truth.** Especially when the left-wing “leaders” in Washington, D.C., the mainstream media, and Big Tech don’t want to hear it. **America is a force for good in the world. We should stand for the national anthem. Police officers keep us safe. Marriage is a holy covenant before God. An unborn child is a child. Children do best when raised by a mother and a father. And there is a difference between boys and girls.** _These truths shouldn’t be objectionable_. Even five years ago, no one would have blinked at these words. But today, saying just one of those statements in America — where we are guaranteed our right to freedom of speech in the Constitution — can get you fired from work or disciplined at school. _This isn’t the future you and I want for our country!_ **Fellow American, your immediate support is necessary to stand up to the communists in Washington who are terrified of patriots like you and me defending freedom, American greatness, and the truth.** [**In the next hour, I need your emergency gift of $15, $35, $50, $100, or more to ensure that Americans who know our Founding Fathers were extraordinary — and who are ready to defend our free speech and religious liberty — are the ones fighting beside me in the Senate.**](http://trk.tedcruz.-rDr132xog) [**Help us fight for American Greatness**](http://trk.tedcruz.) **You and I believe in American greatness and we’ll tell the truth to the next generation.** That’s why it’s up to us — you, Fellow American, and me — to defend basic norms and shared truths against radicals who want to tear down our nation’s very foundation. [**If we don’t fight NOW, in another year or maybe two, we won’t even recognize America. Please help fight for American greatness with your gift in the next hour. There’s much work to be done.**](http://trk.tedcruz.) [**Help us fight for American Greatness**](http://trk.tedcruz.-LWzwRxhrGpWPSCu-kM3w) Thank you for your support, and God bless America. For liberty, Ted Cruz Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 _To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, [click here](http://trk.tedcruz.org/uu/3/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDQ5LTBjNDM4YTc4ZDU3YTQ3ODhhMThlMjQyZjNjMjRhNGQxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/hDkHLr-RBnFT3263yS01FQ) to unsubscribe._
---

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
ACI - Giving Tuesday 2022
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what’s best for our country, to help him take a stand against “cancel culture.”

|
---
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78925%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A%2bg8ApdKvravnWXHh3oBGw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what’s best for our country, to help him take a stand against “cancel culture.” It’s tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by “canceling” Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It’s really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

“Cancel culture” tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn’t listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_“What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?”_

And that’s exactly what we’re doing. It’s why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what’s best for our country.

And we’ve created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78926%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QUoNNS4NQiEy%2bSot0BgIbg&sysid=1)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you’re just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he’s broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... “Enough is enough! I’m fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what’s best for the country.”

If that’s a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI’s **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here’s the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78926%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QUoNNS4NQiEy%2bSot0BgIbg&sysid=1)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you’ll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
This is something he has experienced firsthand.

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg90411qqh7c6pbs7adhusujder67u7p8nvnhcjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o36cth2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfa3k8101kb0gp2na2j9j48ucjaoe4ofevq8u96g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o36cth2bs)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za7li940bo1jck6ukmde2fvhdh6j5dl18ttms6fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti61o36cth2bs)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

American Cornerstone Institute

name: Candace Owens
subject: Do you know what month it is?
body:
Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who have changed the world for the better.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7j3guiqflv1tgu3di52sqlvuljfhgndq7uutbdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn4hqur2trp4vvmnjtgujc14aeb92ce3pnh5iel8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsd8dlibt7d5dov9029kveksrilt8jdj42mniqe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1mhm5hhtiebq9jc0h5m7pde99su79o8le320n50_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi0026mk1jkeh4nc16pg5gndu7mq1ibb2lvsi34o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z34j1af9ucovckij4qqc7m9pvf7u2q2bnnpjv3v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5bvaak6afm5ubflnvnnh0mn86k4tskh7arbb71g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z31sqelq1al4tr90amd4qpb0jp6a5j60gqln49og_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5239bbks6rc92ovnuful5bgg9l07tj1ehq0vgo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zolo1rk5ojgdb84laojjqdb7iegvjl26rg70o5r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3s0nbtuoof8h7ji17p369lmssiq91tdaslgirn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq8jeq3mrmq5rlpn7bmqkl25rt3bd141bjg3ie70_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or3clh2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Watch and share this course on DVD
body:
We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zljjj2g4fl8413n2lmrf34cfdvqfpne7rge1opcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti69o77cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic." ** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9f3hum872h8uj8hoptmfltpbjsm5pgqeq619dso_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti69o77cjh2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2u51ca3igt68b33n1o6o18ddvtnbfpnmu58oms8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti69o77cjh2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv6k9e09p1q3v8re5lc0ql7pot2ojp4hcl0elvfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cti69o77cjh2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" **and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”

| |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659482%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9VWF0uTJ3Omc5fsdEjUWvQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659482%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9VWF0uTJ3Omc5fsdEjUWvQ&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659483%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fKYcb17N65Dr2dmQvqZqLg&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659484%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v3tJ4b%2fxv9xfLtR0RIxi1w&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659482%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9VWF0uTJ3Omc5fsdEjUWvQ&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659495%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xH4AUCtjIrUPikdxbG9Dcw&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659496%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bjQZCvpySxFqLj6AQy7Q8Q&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659497%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Oa2%2b5WkMmSbCZUhjBGHnzA&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=laCmVTwV35Gh2BLUYZhxDA&sysid=1)

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Sign the Petition: Tell Republicans NO cuts to Social Security and Medicare!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | _UPDATE: Republicans in Congress are STILL hellbent on cutting Social Security and Medicare, and are threatening to crash America’s economy hostage in order to do it. **[Sign the petition now, say NO to cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and fight back against Republican attacks!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td697631f-9d9d-43c3-a9d1-cba5132127b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The only way we will stop these cuts is if enough people speak out, and Republicans feel the pressure! So **[add your name](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96711b25-d577-4a22-8a21-e015909eb9d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** , and tell others to do the same!_
---
| | | Friend, Since the start of the 118th Congress, MAGA House Republicans have made it clear how they plan to govern: chaos. Their first order of business? **Holding our entire economy hostage.** Last month, we hit the debt ceiling -- which represents the legal cap on how much the treasury can borrow to fund its legal obligations -- and **[House Republicans are refusing to raise it unless vital programs are slashed. Which programs are their main targets? Medicare and Social Security.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d4f284b-3011-41ad-98dd-d121fc85328f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** President Biden laid out their attack on these programs to the nation during the State of the Union, despite the GOP’s attempts to deny it. But they said it themselves: Senator Mike Lee of Utah declared, "It will be my objective to phase out Social Security, to pull it up by the roots and get rid of it." And Senator Rick Scott, former chair of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, is advocating to require constant re-appropriation to keep Medicare and Social Security going -- meaning if Congress can’t get to an agreement, the programs would end. **We cannot let this happen.** Right now many working class Americans are struggling with inflation and rising costs of living. Any cuts to Medicare and Social Security -- programs seniors have been paying into their whole lives -- would only threaten the livelihoods of millions. **[Indivisible is standing up for working families and fighting back, but we need your help: Sign your name if you agree we should protect and strengthen Medicare and Social Security benefits >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8273f9dd-9b59-445b-938b-4059374fde7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta84ad0ed-4fff-4294-a260-3a8c0e447442/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The fact is this: Republicans have raised the debt ceiling time and time again when Trump was in office. They’ve also added trillions to the debt by providing tax cuts to corporations and billionaires. So we’re not buying their “balancing the budget” act because we know what they’re really about: putting their extremist agenda over delivering for working families _every single time. _ Friend, we’re tired of the games MAGA Republicans are playing with our economy. A default on our debt could be disastrous, and the extremists in their party don’t seem to care -- they’d rather slash programs that millions rely on to stay out of poverty. [**Millions depend on these programs, and Indivisible is committed to protecting them. Sign your name right away if you agree there should be _no_ cuts to Medicare and Social Security benefits -- period.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d278008-04fb-451f-8647-ebaeb7405ba1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e0e8e11-6978-4d6c-8dfd-24f9d52e3cc6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks for taking action,
Indivisible Team
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9ead863-e13c-49df-92df-a1bb9e26fed6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13286655-b31f-4e3a-bc16-59f738f08908/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T86ee4bf5-8e34-4395-bae8-5f5d1aafec87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20cd70ea-2a58-4fac-aa12-e3eccc3bda9f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
Follow Us | [](https://Facebook.com/LeftAction) | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=LeftAction) | [](https://www.instagram.com/left_action/)
---|---|---
| LeftAction
Washington, District of Columbia
info@leftaction.com

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=65cde24b00ee4450ae9c4413b99c1bb9&_e=LBgpGeORe_lfAcSm7mbyPVEOdlWS7HoyIvuuJOXtJNnvK1BilQFte2I9kHdC4iTl4WsfteGECiDO5c72OylMCBFJ0GIZ1Gi67zX0mAsneJDor4X5n3HlzDdzEZ-pZ16I9KHlB3OuFkg_hs8veNd-ID7Fzi_8sfS_L7TaGcOCHLdSEJjX6t8tll6SbhhXllILSCHB6J9hYJ720lem4OdoGliUNlYQ0VHXafp8FGYTSLL1fmwL6nJfsoJ9ff56SkwKfv5Z-9rhkNNczzunEesjYNr8FATzgTUPFSYF8N0G02L79G1jqU0ZIzuulVO094nvb4Ppo9SvQVdrX3O4Jp_-IIlOmuaJOpFNpz9F-RYEJAkOPkw-rOJiaLCScJHneoWrgfdRaXqSjcEi0mR8d1sokof4rU7jkPphDM3Rhgv4wTAPV4OfHf4pmKmGoKKtrKKr)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=65cde24b00ee4450ae9c4413b99c1bb9&_e=LBgpGeORe_lfAcSm7mbyPVEOdlWS7HoyIvuuJOXtJNnvK1BilQFte2I9kHdC4iTl4WsfteGECiDO5c72OylMCBFJ0GIZ1Gi67zX0mAsneJDor4X5n3HlzDdzEZ-pZ16I9KHlB3OuFkg_hs8veNd-ID7Fzi_8sfS_L7TaGcOCHLdSEJjX6t8tll6SbhhXllILSCHB6J9hYJ720lem4OdoGliUNlYQ0VHXafp8FGYTSLL1fmwL6nJfsoJ9ff56SkwKfv5Z-9rhkNNczzunEesjYLvz4vl6MKAvcoETVC53TfGAOuoyHfemQ4z1Ye_6qy896YS5mx8HR307yD9f8tF4dUQP4_wDO2Z9iy5DcTjXV9-t5CRjSXV2QAjvrhFRVRYhxxp_Zy8AYjFzKcAomTdkf9by6RgtwXLMDbdMBoD-os6WpzqBp1RqeLt8bpqn95CR)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=65cde24b00ee4450ae9c4413b99c1bb9&_e=LBgpGeORe_lfAcSm7mbyPVEOdlWS7HoyIvuuJOXtJNnvK1BilQFte2I9kHdC4iTl4WsfteGECiDO5c72OylMCBFJ0GIZ1Gi67zX0mAsneJDor4X5n3HlzDdzEZ-pZ16I9KHlB3OuFkg_hs8veNd-ID7Fzi_8sfS_L7TaGcOCHLdSEJjX6t8tll6SbhhXllILSCHB6J9hYJ720lem4OdoGliUNlYQ0VHXafp8FGYTSLL1fmwL6nJfsoJ9ff56SkwKfv5Z-9rhkNNczzunEesjYLEo_SrCLA6IbzGcMfrB4uzA1i_Is8vleBCIPu-yVbWVJsUDJmBFaMLtm7Aru1M-epppTJ55ZY53IyP_GIDn6mtMDLqOmaaGbMjSI096O5LW4wlxFUfXh1IqwAzEwkbyhXWVyF26FUKpoh6fB_YFc-z_GkyQeR9wuzbhbWiTA_Y0)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=65cde24b00ee4450ae9c4413b99c1bb9&_e=LBgpGeORe_lfAcSm7mbyPVEOdlWS7HoyIvuuJOXtJNnvK1BilQFte2I9kHdC4iTl4WsfteGECiDO5c72OylMCBFJ0GIZ1Gi67zX0mAsneJDor4X5n3HlzDdzEZ-pZ16I9KHlB3OuFkg_hs8veNd-ID7Fzi_8sfS_L7TaGcOCHLdSEJjX6t8tll6SbhhXllILSCHB6J9hYJ720lem4OdoGliUNlYQ0VHXafp8FGYTSLL1fmwL6nJfsoJ9ff56SkwKfv5Z-9rhkNNczzunEesjYKKNx8UmgfXfHOJ-SoD_3EGHhgXIivx_1GzNgU5bdD1gZTqMTry9Vew5tPeKpDzKECY6es0KKjK8kZNk1cshGS9WNREVwUkfzoEZO2Pk0I1xAGWaKUJEacx-8d4KYCsmteVZS61c6g5AlFQGRxzLVXwJr7w23K920wvGXZMniGe_).

name: Full Mag News
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course

| | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3aebad69959a43149ac00c6b16a99f2d&_e=PSvH5MV-mMC0mZsigmdiljUbbfxaNA-TJUafB5BUDguzdyvVZihlDofJ_naukRMao_MrelJBtO-x7TLKP77gPcknowAh1e5o3lluU6w2npWmZO8hVjR9f-ph-OIpLITtZdmxGszGcY1NnaKHZW43PniWWBLUKH8BnoC9FFUX7GxZHEUWRVzjAjSm7ZOlSVLZ-1VhZXNhNNv3Q5sRgQSadkYqz-DJqq9V21cm87ql-Iv89EudoyQNLMnXyamr56bbg77vllMz6hdwbhyQHWurVPEFkr9C0mb3v2LKBlTpWRCFuoHITGIonUQ9TPyzwBDvWDWpkeIrQB0j3rXIxZ-ZxNkjduLQHdgd5bvXWAHLANZQvZFE9OHD8KH093LiSxlp3TJopoCi-E9AHzWhjRDAbA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3aebad69959a43149ac00c6b16a99f2d&_e=PSvH5MV-mMC0mZsigmdiljUbbfxaNA-TJUafB5BUDguzdyvVZihlDofJ_naukRMao_MrelJBtO-x7TLKP77gPcknowAh1e5o3lluU6w2npWmZO8hVjR9f-ph-OIpLITtZdmxGszGcY1NnaKHZW43PniWWBLUKH8BnoC9FFUX7GxZHEUWRVzjAjSm7ZOlSVLZ-1VhZXNhNNv3Q5sRgQSadkYqz-DJqq9V21cm87ql-Iv89EudoyQNLMnXyamr56bbd_SZaX-0ToX91Lk4y_oAjm-YjU_WRIAhNIXj0FABZrxjmFa-tS4N6mF6uFZIE7k-ncCAFmBfWlPiPjfWNSdMvFPoEL3f9OyGlSl0pEyoV-1KYVq88I8EpMh68Xe4QjiRfV-PH4wr_6zzt30OYro6xA%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3aebad69959a43149ac00c6b16a99f2d&_e=PSvH5MV-mMC0mZsigmdiljUbbfxaNA-TJUafB5BUDguzdyvVZihlDofJ_naukRMao_MrelJBtO-x7TLKP77gPcknowAh1e5o3lluU6w2npWmZO8hVjR9f-ph-OIpLITtZdmxGszGcY1NnaKHZW43PniWWBLUKH8BnoC9FFUX7GxZHEUWRVzjAjSm7ZOlSVLZ-1VhZXNhNNv3Q5sRgQSadkYqz-DJqq9V21cm87ql-Iv89EudoyQNLMnXyamr56bb-NqzhGMVWf5zR68mRMvjyvbYn7uRbUny0r0k0rPz0Vhu39SG0iQDBtVKNUy8q7CFn1q_WIreKLHETACdzBlSJYffq6wfqHLPtJiQ-GGM8eJcTBtKFAbRnMk04EEjn_A3KYppdkaM-bUmZ81cKdJzhw%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b631123105d48478b33405d1b8536a1&_e=yeBjzQke_VSZm1qtDOm7m7-IkV4hyRwQZBLsIRSExB_V1-n1tufByfhPLYxU-pKn2pp0pAItRohi5Bt333JPzl6yousoYohMPUtsoEShozw1SpYvp3sKYOud-qGl7741So2LdYxAcOvliANdX3WUZjiCSGxQKgA4QW0leHPQquUF5fYCzWctB-nB-wQ_fK2tccv9iF9Uy1Q9ukg0y-FAmELKdlPNnxUpg38sAj8-AANZ3_rC5qBjkY4pazocGkUcn7uQ2969mCPLnwV9fe_VmFuiPd8_J7QAsuxH6QgY-YY%3D)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b631123105d48478b33405d1b8536a1&_e=yeBjzQke_VSZm1qtDOm7m7-IkV4hyRwQZBLsIRSExB_V1-n1tufByfhPLYxU-pKn2pp0pAItRohi5Bt333JPzl6yousoYohMPUtsoEShozw1SpYvp3sKYOud-qGl7741So2LdYxAcOvliANdX3WUZmWnxt6hIW1HgyUIUXtQCjxKiILWtB6yqPOVzK_PHnmeaAgiKQNEIPV0dpZqPrNPndp5P_bfDo651dNzI74Bip0GKeMCPYsAjs02dIGB4zKgHf53ecuVGQne7kEN5aOoFXbqg_8Z1j8AHX_lB2OhINA%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b631123105d48478b33405d1b8536a1&_e=yeBjzQke_VSZm1qtDOm7m7-IkV4hyRwQZBLsIRSExB_V1-n1tufByfhPLYxU-pKn2pp0pAItRohi5Bt333JPzl6yousoYohMPUtsoEShozw1SpYvp3sKYOud-qGl7741So2LdYxAcOvliANdX3WUZiXh23ku1vp6z4VSEfpr5y1Q9sjiC-LKsZtD0kBlQf0OeWl3ITeZszM3p9rbCjvUm-iPzNn0YJ7se6B4sfJNDvwh6RbtmdI7DM5_dnHmLoYHURr_XqlbWSt_21r7nqkdT9gF0PIJa3_2lZLPsMi4NuQ%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b631123105d48478b33405d1b8536a1&_e=yeBjzQke_VSZm1qtDOm7m7-IkV4hyRwQZBLsIRSExB_V1-n1tufByfhPLYxU-pKn2pp0pAItRohi5Bt333JPzl6yousoYohMPUtsoEShozw1SpYvp3sKYOud-qGl7741laXA6xTzA2p_i1X8Ylr9rLRb1eSyJnixZMdVHl-NwZC-dH1P7YMgWwU2qQXXhpf-_noyiFq9A0Og33Rc1WvbD9ci_58DrZ2eGwsLjr7UHEb7-TRDeDXzkzWnvJwSCZOAEMu7VICdoBmH0ECJrgvZESunB165ecyWirJ_wY75y9c%3D)
