clean_body: The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Friend, It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works. Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better. It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America. I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did: " You're going to relegate my history to a month? Black history is American history. " My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities. To teach true American history -- and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month. BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . . . . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books. . . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. Does America need a "Great Reset?"

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=043cec4b9a32471cb3ee4cb8a97496ba&_e=wPEjmQByMTvI-tvUtb27ik2ghq1463Fmkje1S-BMY3U_3XSJd_jbA397Cq4CWt6UDba9lf5X5JezbP2dzdsvWr_TTSM943I8AFvaUVZ5-QyPbjVkjyFMQ7rOg9bqnzlVqr-TIgKFStd7mbDBJhtrXmteQ21CnoD-2fuspL8yBAy3o_Fp3UvP7rFC5US-c0xkaOXnDKUnu-myV5jGzi_sfX0pMF4n3G_qg_zDqu4KXSxYWl54HZc2z6HU_yp8gk7GPW9XDJtkBwikNdr9NmUDuWBBwjSwI2lXOoKxsfHi2L1u3ElaX3BG2X_j1hMj459CjWYSOoEuLBipvOmEbbBhFcR4IgAadepRidEbXV4ShHYArFs3PprNRXCLgr9kMu7F)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, Does America need a "Great Reset?" In 2020, members of the world's elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "we need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar --titled ["The Great Reset?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=043cec4b9a32471cb3ee4cb8a97496ba&_e=wPEjmQByMTvI-tvUtb27ik2ghq1463Fmkje1S-BMY3U_3XSJd_jbA397Cq4CWt6UDba9lf5X5JezbP2dzdsvWr_TTSM943I8AFvaUVZ5-QyPbjVkjyFMQ7rOg9bqnzlVqr-TIgKFStd7mbDBJhtrXmteQ21CnoD-2fuspL8yBAy3o_Fp3UvP7rFC5US-c0xkaOXnDKUnu-myV5jGzi_sfX0pMF4n3G_qg_zDqu4KXSx2SE1VeoRkAP8tHfad6C14_xe_pCCXzEvvm8ofupX5fSIXvGEjtGLzHfOQkzb6GxGQN3f2FuEud85bgqLWrs7laWM_Z5RHyDd6Xqt5cInfmtCzXziJdIJB2-bHWKGAH6I-LY8ydNZnBR4RzpZ2hhB9)****["](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=043cec4b9a32471cb3ee4cb8a97496ba&_e=wPEjmQByMTvI-tvUtb27ik2ghq1463Fmkje1S-BMY3U_3XSJd_jbA397Cq4CWt6UDba9lf5X5JezbP2dzdsvWr_TTSM943I8AFvaUVZ5-QyPbjVkjyFMQ7rOg9bqnzlVqr-TIgKFStd7mbDBJhtrXmteQ21CnoD-2fuspL8yBAy3o_Fp3UvP7rFC5US-c0xkaOXnDKUnu-myV5jGzi_sfX0pMF4n3G_qg_zDqu4KXSxUmri0fvzZ3gxyh01xxU5CgFFtQzG9EEKOZY9O7dWgyC_uXmnPLyP6F5R94mKtKojeyb9jsHZZQOueUZUplNVY1kcLWmpFlEky5C07cyuwo6CPm8nbc5FZPXG-O6zQk08_SdBnM1rV3xt2Q9aCckOd) --is now available as a free online video series.**
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=043cec4b9a32471cb3ee4cb8a97496ba&_e=wPEjmQByMTvI-tvUtb27ik2ghq1463Fmkje1S-BMY3U_3XSJd_jbA397Cq4CWt6UDba9lf5X5JezbP2dzdsvWr_TTSM943I8AFvaUVZ5-QyPbjVkjyFMQ7rOg9bqnzlVqr-TIgKFStd7mbDBJhtrXmteQ21CnoD-2fuspL8yBAy3o_Fp3UvP7rFC5US-c0xkaOXnDKUnu-myV5jGzi_sfX0pMF4n3G_qg_zDqu4KXSx_gZck3MM88ip0bTruxyjaOS9UQL77aLj37XYx9RvcaFV1rnNkrlbyo1dF3q58vv5RUhlmaE5TiYkXyuyofhk24KN3ALDX5J3SzKqDcOd_-6z-LDxBnWSvTwDMP8YvAogkgh4IiNYxkW1fdwmO3o9r)
---
| | Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What "environmental justice" has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China's perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=043cec4b9a32471cb3ee4cb8a97496ba&_e=wPEjmQByMTvI-tvUtb27ik2ghq1463Fmkje1S-BMY3U_3XSJd_jbA397Cq4CWt6UDba9lf5X5JezbP2dzdsvWr_TTSM943I8AFvaUVZ5-QyPbjVkjyFMQ7rOg9bqnzlVqr-TIgKFStd7mbDBJhtrXmteQ21CnoD-2fuspL8yBAy3o_Fp3UvP7rFC5US-c0xkaOXnDKUnu-myV5jGzi_sfX0pMF4n3G_qg_zDqu4KXSzr8VIBnGKd90iwuiBIdbEppGlzpOFfbbRWPiU1BvDd-xoSqm9NFAFZJvMKLkMkLZsBxOo7n1BsR3Q01yizCpZrp_fXx5d-U6Kg5lw0H8BeC-ZFQGjRweajdWs3Q2Mq-KaVAQKEP0MnC4Y5xmflQM2I)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Should Dr. Ben Carson Be Canceled?
body:
Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture."

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3cf216f6439443089a8cabb2eb67fc1&_e=X0cfnMDWf0UPXEeyTywPdtzInYVuuuRudzT9apqgB3BE7yFhZpGHmBZcP7tSWUSvKlXzBkoaRPJSCV5ywF9EB8EH7RlWKBqpPN0Bhaxbr8YDdkThSzVemVfnmtO5eyQ12Voz3OICCSqUX1HQN8aCCgvH_oG_E3kz12UxnjU4WWXmsip06Q-OyTxJN_YgR8E5Qq_qI_NlJQMXkTQSxdHNgrleulXZnKSocjfGxeAaDsHyDzxCfVCj7X7FbjZP8T-Qh12yZOX18ybZkRPokTbOxcTmDmyfrjSZB_aXfvH5zfd5lp3Mj-RCrZRKee_0dO_GG2J7yp6cnfMXprEemfCceFZ0C67HvErj9coKpLo55r0Xmi9KbgxygjQV7RNdxQ9v05dC99bMghwdtDMBcMs4LDBqBCvN1P__1TH8t6RhpGo%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3cf216f6439443089a8cabb2eb67fc1&_e=X0cfnMDWf0UPXEeyTywPdtzInYVuuuRudzT9apqgB3BE7yFhZpGHmBZcP7tSWUSvKlXzBkoaRPJSCV5ywF9EB8EH7RlWKBqpPN0Bhaxbr8YDdkThSzVemVfnmtO5eyQ12Voz3OICCSqUX1HQN8aCCgvH_oG_E3kz12UxnjU4WWXmsip06Q-OyTxJN_YgR8E5Qq_qI_NlJQMXkTQSxdHNgrleulXZnKSocjfGxeAaDsHyDzxCfVCj7X7FbjZP8T-Qh12yZOX18ybZkRPokTbOxcLFUhTKDYC_ZKF2SC0pudpzb8lYgW6hluXxVnpXpDUlOz7mflxqURudp0mvI9hhfWIlJI8g3cWAjis1owpjJocmmVVLr5G9WmbOFP4y3JDkdqZeOjEY6jr_K_PL8dcFsxOvfPN4cpXG969usvrBs_c%3D)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f3cf216f6439443089a8cabb2eb67fc1&_e=X0cfnMDWf0UPXEeyTywPdtzInYVuuuRudzT9apqgB3BE7yFhZpGHmBZcP7tSWUSvKlXzBkoaRPJSCV5ywF9EB8EH7RlWKBqpPN0Bhaxbr8YDdkThSzVemVfnmtO5eyQ12Voz3OICCSqUX1HQN8aCCgvH_oG_E3kz12UxnjU4WWXmsip06Q-OyTxJN_YgR8E5Qq_qI_NlJQMXkTQSxdHNgrleulXZnKSocjfGxeAaDsHyDzxCfVCj7X7FbjZP8T-Qh12yZOX18ybZkRPokTbOxQ6tyP4rBTGl0BqLHYjnJl7yT1NpI2vswWoUkh9B_Clrj8XieCHPTJAmWOKJhzf7QpBXYA1eQiunHE1vDtz4pUTZn4q_ilNqdayqhT0rVs-6ndnJf0uQzyB9XtPP_FsfoIvQaEmov61Sn9yMgoELLrk%3D)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4mr0ojt6tg3foq39vn02afq0t3bvtckvsm9u4m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgg3u59pdh556e62bjlcb05phm6mo28v0g4g6b30_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6tjhfirst6r9oohuaq4pg2ac70b6ssq6h1qq10o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Watch these videos today
body:
Does America need a “Great Reset?”

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfvp64n25nsjvhj6fktqjrkmums7dup04u4o97ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb7cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Does America need a “Great Reset?” In 2020, members of the world’s elite met at the World Economic Forum and launched the Great Reset initiative to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab—the founder and executive director of the Forum—wrote, “we need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, this would have the effect of canceling our American way of life. A recent Hillsdale College seminar considered the idea of the Great Reset, its ramifications for America, and pro-freedom alternatives. **This seminar—titled[“The Great Reset?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ie18aejg24dho27e73fifkechsslld4cfeh6fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb7cth2bs)****[”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z17kv5r0avucdi7d5fhuf3pihl30ehc4mph51slg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb7cth2bs)[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za0gd70vjcbk5obdg88ihenneu4v5a0nemp29vg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb7cth2bs)—is now available as a free online video series.**

---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zijdc0eh4smo4he44ld7qg7u41oeuu2dvn5fb2mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb7cth2bs)
---
| |
Filmed on the Hillsdale campus, this video series will give you insight into:
* The origins and leaders of the Great Reset
* How the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations
* The connection between a cashless society and the Great Reset
* What “environmental justice” has to do with the Great Reset
* The Great Reset from China’s perspective
* Alternatives to the Great Reset

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztcurb0onaj8riihavt4rp9rlu25mdg7n7i039b0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb7cth2bs)** You will learn about the Great Reset, the dangers it poses, and pro-freedom alternatives. And you can share these lessons with your family, friends, and more. As America’s economy continues to struggle in the aftermath of disastrous elite decisions, lessons like these are essential to the defense of the free market and American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:
160 Democrats voted to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections.

|
---
| | | Democrats want voting rights for non-citizens???

160 Democrats voted to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections.

**OUTRAGEOUS.**

---

---

The same group that is in support of open borders wants votes for non citizens.

You can clearly see where they're going with this.

A future where illegal immigrants and foreign agents can vote Democrat Democrat Democrat all the way down their ballots.

If they get away with this, it could truly be the end of the GOP. We would never win an election ever again.

But I promise you this Friend, as long as I am Speaker of the House, this will NEVER be a reality.

---

If you're willing to stand with us on this issue. If you believe voting should be a sacred right reserved for American citizens, then I need you to take a stand right now.

If we don't meet this Democrat plot with overwhelming force, the consequences could be DISASTROUS.

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

subject: We are suing the ATF
body:
If we don’t stop this massive ATF abuse in its tracks, these tyrants will go around Congress and try to re-write federal law t
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z091hcej9fo9kvo8okbc22e0hep7d6a6b5cm72q8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s9ncdgrddjje8p6at5icer70pjgegp61clhmlo64cr761gbed3ncsrjcorkcpo6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32s5lmkrr5cb6ehgb6p1nm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmeor7c9ie0oj5c8iv0)

---
Friend, The ATF's MASSIVE new gun control rule could make MILLIONS of American gun owners into criminals - putting them at risk of fines, ATF raids, arrest, imprisonment, or even worse... Attorneys for FPC Action Foundation, the _leading_ 501(c)3 organization fighting to defend **_your_** __ Second Amendment rights, have already taken legal action to stop the ATF's tyrannical scheme. But to defeat the ATF, our attorneys need your support. **If we don 't stop this massive ATF abuse in its tracks, these tyrants will go around Congress and try to re-write federal law to target YOU and YOUR FAMILY**. Friend, we're gearing up for an intense, multi-year legal battle against the Biden Administration. But we have to know how many freedom-loving Americans will stand with us in this important fight! [**Will you sign FPC Action Foundation 's open letter in SUPPORT of our legal action against ATF? **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8dno3to0ckq74o6gcu0lihemlkccrspkkhdhqqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32clh2bs)
---
[Stand with FPC Action Foundation](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2h1i4cjpim40278favagtnbb3vttlflqgmivang_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32clh2bs)
---
Friend, this is just the beginning. Make no mistake, if we let this ATF abuse slide, they'll keep coming after us no matter what guns you own. Joe Biden and his anti-gun ATF will continue to attack YOUR Second Amendment rights until they're stopped. The gun-grabbing ATF are counting on freedom-loving Americans staying silent. **_Please don 't be quiet now. We need you in this fight!_** As our legal team presses forward with our urgent and necessary lawsuit against the ATF, we need to know if we have the support of the American people behind us. [**Are you in?**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3koe6kjuop0ioi93j1idva5cc31202q2j38pepg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32clh2bs) [**If you support our lawsuit against the ATF 's unconstitutional rule, you have to add your name to FPC Action Foundation's open letter NOW!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbebuts4sj9u8a8094k4v6ilp2tg38q6pjcui0r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32clh2bs)
---
[Stand with FPC Action Foundation](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zpktj04a43dshrkhd3rncfik9co75ndumi4a47io_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32clh2bs)
---
Friend, if we let this ATF abuse stand, it would send a loud and clear message to the Biden Administration that they can do whatever they want --- that our guns are up for grabs. But the simple truth is our Right to Keep and Bear Arms is the last line of defense against a tyrannical government. And we WILL NOT stay silent and let the federal government undermine YOUR fundamental, individual rights and put you and your guns at risk. There's not much time before ATF's rule affects MILLIONS of American gun owners. Our attorneys are counting on freedom-loving Americans like YOU to join us and stand against this tyranny. [**Please, if you support our fight against the ATF, add your name to the open letter in SUPPORT of FPC Action Foundation 's legal action TODAY.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zthhm63ppi52qt7gd1uhdh988coq874fpajlm8eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth69o32clh2bs)

---
For freedom,
---
---
Brandon Combs Founder & President FPC Action Foundation

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z88m7p0sl12otr1t49uvidr8vp0njeiv1qilk89o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or7c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn4jn0865j8d9k8qn5fk01sbql9nbn5lhhn8q908_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or7c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztt2evebiki8at94a6tvje37ooleo1ktqrndk610_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or7c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5u83p93r6v5ucj6fmq0acd9ll9v35d39eaar8ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth68or7c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

| |

| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjgaag2bnmkbtv33mi06lps5ut1dse46tckom01g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb4sph2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh63ui5dn6oteaacpglrank6kkkda87h52rpls98_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb4sph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1d7rln4suu9688sc0dnmof8folguqr3s8ltdk88_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb4sph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdau5duv5flvmja1669e38c20qqekhnjlq5fgcb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cth6apb4sph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Team Haley
subject: Does Nikki have your support?
body:
This week has been a great (and busy) week in South Carolina!

Add your name
| |
---
| | Friend,

This week has been a great (and busy) week in South Carolina!

Nikki Haley took the stage in her home state to officially announce her run for President of the United States and now she is on the road to meet with voters in New Hampshire and Iowa.

Momentum is already building and Team Haley invites YOU to join the movement. _**[Will you stand with Nikki?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53b7453137c749989dc69d88ef478eda&_e=SvBGulpjm81s0Lxd3frCSmsvieQDJSJ6z6NP542KG6Tln1wXWBe_WWqnC8KQFa9xUzPuHGbDwbjiuQAngM70rIkPrPe-sRmeRpBGIrU3B9iecj_s5L9WApDiMrTeX7Xfc-70ygPUvlDn9OcYWs2OA_rKA62EQ5ROp-R08bp28s0sM_--wvEq5-M1ORmXBLDYO4T1BL97T0wovstbtrGKDRC8sGfRrpR9gJDltZI6fejEXhZhDVAfHR7P3lLe9s6FmT2ApjsUkOmyfDq8eOOJedFjY9SI8hgw3COHpJ8t7nVomvpKkYOgij7EkqwZixE_QqRREz3CgQ6NYWUPl-p-iCL258V_mvFYJoAjvdhdtP27nEL8HH_BdFNoa67p4sNgM9yFmdHm8t0szJuEQdT8G4-8DZ2RnHHZ4iipxbdYEXC5sZIZXYJUJaPEYgOuRToW2zbVw74h5Sr-H_rQzfYGDr8eQyJCG5weRWZJyM2fKD34PNP3doylA__E7xnF6YC4ImOMyAA4QPm1TinwTYZGDEH1WEulcSxo21I3VL49zl-jHn-aAi7UV2dAekOqbb5ZgsHd-FoZi-_2SbIkxuFwzHGVZCxQoApE-_7aKOvK94pdfTIKY1egtKWDCzaxBkI4351EoQ_K7XMyM1n1CHmoBQ%3D%3D "Will you stand with Nikki?")**_

It means the world to Nikki to know she has grassroots support from conservatives across the country. _**[Can she count on your early support?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53b7453137c749989dc69d88ef478eda&_e=SvBGulpjm81s0Lxd3frCSmsvieQDJSJ6z6NP542KG6Tln1wXWBe_WWqnC8KQFa9xUzPuHGbDwbjiuQAngM70rIkPrPe-sRmeRpBGIrU3B9iecj_s5L9WApDiMrTeX7Xfc-70ygPUvlDn9OcYWs2OA_rKA62EQ5ROp-R08bp28s0sM_--wvEq5-M1ORmXBLDYO4T1BL97T0wovstbtrGKDRC8sGfRrpR9gJDltZI6fejEXhZhDVAfHR7P3lLe9s6FmT2ApjsUkOmyfDq8eOOJedFjY9SI8hgw3COHpJ8t7nVomvpKkYOgij7EkqwZixE_QqRREz3CgQ6NYWUPl-p-iCL258V_mvFYJoAjvdhdtP27nEL8HH_BdFNoa67p4sNgM9yFmdHm8t0szJuEQdT8G4-8DZ2RnHHZ4iipxbdYEXC5sZIZXYJUJaPEYgOuRToW2zbVw74h5Sr-H_rQzfYGDr8eQyJCG5weRWZJyM2fKD34PNP3doylA__E7xnF6YC4x_8D9C-T34ZGJizSu6IJywTUI_Vnydtvh6Ds3CjcFNr0dNzWsKAkP_2CFYqfl5b9WBHbRivchaSubMu0H2f2vuM3p-wHc4pTNfbIyNvG6JlUZv52mZtUimGm5cqkq34gQBHq-88Jc18IUCPRBucGYg%3D%3D "Can she count on your early support?")**_

If you support Nikki in her fight to stand for conservative values, defend our country's freedoms, and restore the American Dream, make sure to let her know! It only takes a second but makes a huge difference, so please be sure to _**[stand with Nikki Haley for President today.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=53b7453137c749989dc69d88ef478eda&_e=SvBGulpjm81s0Lxd3frCSmsvieQDJSJ6z6NP542KG6Tln1wXWBe_WWqnC8KQFa9xUzPuHGbDwbjiuQAngM70rIkPrPe-sRmeRpBGIrU3B9iecj_s5L9WApDiMrTeX7Xfc-70ygPUvlDn9OcYWs2OA_rKA62EQ5ROp-R08bp28s0sM_--wvEq5-M1ORmXBLDYO4T1BL97T0wovstbtrGKDRC8sGfRrpR9gJDltZI6fejEXhZhDVAfHR7P3lLe9s6FmT2ApjsUkOmyfDq8eOOJedFjY9SI8hgw3COHpJ8t7nVomvpKkYOgij7EkqwZixE_QqRREz3CgQ6NYWUPl-p-iCL258V_mvFYJoAjvdhdtP27nEL8HH_BdFNoa67p4sNgM9yFmdHm8t0szJuEQdT8G4-8DZ2RnHHZ4iipxbdYEXC5sZIZXYJUJaPEYgOuRToW2zbVw74h5Sr-H_rQzfYGDr8eQyJCG5weRWZJyM2fKD34PNP3doylA__E7xnF6YC4BabFTRN08CIk-oI6__Pf_QQFQpp1eVT9s2OCD2MM0-Ssb56A5it-uAttYlu4JiAh3FYSVK86OgGVdfXmrnwiR9BxWAgV2Y0alAQYuTZu0jKpAPj_TgyIibexy4_5UBrf4SAxvIh0gWQ4Len6tjnxZg%3D%3D "Nikki Haley for President today.")**_

Thank you,

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . .

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp1anic4lsgct7o8e1gkbntu9ddoufl7nhir2sng_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf1n9crkoifortgjgr6ntsh75ng64pdlnds266j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0pui3it03ooo6ve8j7a7s8u6n6ons7d5c2l9e60_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3b5gkuer9mcg4arb52nc8d98opvqknoj13guq2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0jqtfu8hktupi8e3h6ls9b12vc1acsej0dcv2ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znrqusunvu50l2mpjei3d52s23rdgc8vp07euu70_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdipq8ee4qlaqviej9eobrsqcp18n29tcnl3898o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl9ctvc9sau0fo8glembgib6lj066g5lmpqr1vv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr2t1uio0qit3np2k1262mf84d4s6kog4fic13ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbbvh0oafj7g6s9u3oc9210g74d3edidd562v9j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5khgi7iu711koivcgkvu3i1oceuc22efj1vt31g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkndbignhlesrh93898hgmoli0p959klor36ed0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctj60o72c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_Allow me to start off with a simple message: **Thank You.**_

Words cannot express how grateful I am for every patriot who supported me, prayed for me, and stood by my side throughout this ordeal.

You are all proof that the America First Movement is made up of the best and most selfless that our great country has to offer.

Over the past few months, just like CNN admitted to on camera, **the Fake News Media has endlessly propagandized my life and told lies about me.**

And it was all because I'm EFFECTIVE at impacting legislation. They always come after the fighters.

But I don't take my Ps and Qs from the mainstream media. **I work for YOU!**

And grassroots patriots like you have returned the favor by standing by my side...

This America First Movement - the strongest political force in the country - stood with me throughout the saga, refusing to fall for the media narratives and providing critical resources that helped me fight back. And as a result, we have weathered the storm that they sent to try and take us out.

God never gives us anything we cannot handle...
_**THANK YOU ONCE AGAIN FOR SUPPORTING ME AND HELPING ME WITHSTAND THEIR LIES!**_

_**You don 't let the process become the punishment - you forge ahead!**_

And that's exactly what I will continue to do. I will continue this work to put America First, to get us out of pointless foreign wars, to stop our border from becoming a turnstile, and to serve nobly on the new committee focused on the weaponization of government (something that hits close to home having gone through this...)

**But, I also know that the attacks won 't end here. We must continue to watch our backs... Because that's where the target is. They will keep coming for me - and for YOU - until they have wiped our movement off the political map.**

We stop them by standing united. We stop them when patriots like YOU are invested in the mission. Because now, we have PROOF that we can outlast their attacks...

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Allow me to start off with a simple message: Thank You. Words cannot express how grateful I am for every patriot who supported me, prayed for me, and stood by my side throughout this ordeal. You are all proof that the America First Movement is made up of the best and most selfless that our great country has to offer. Over the past few months, just like CNN admitted to on camera, the Fake News Media has endlessly propagandized my life and told lies about me. And it was all because I'm EFFECTIVE at impacting legislation. They always come after the fighters. But I don't take my Ps and Qs from the mainstream media. I work for YOU! And grassroots patriots like you have returned the favor by standing by my side... This America First Movement - the strongest political force in the country - stood with me throughout the saga, refusing to fall for the media narratives and providing critical resources that helped me fight back. And as a result, we have weathered the storm that they sent to try and take us out. God never gives us anything we cannot handle... THANK YOU ONCE AGAIN FOR SUPPORTING ME AND HELPING ME WITHSTAND THEIR LIES! | "KEEP UP THE FIGHT!" | | | | | Other America First fighters like Jim Jordan and President Trump showed exactly how to deal with lies and smears like these. You don 't let the process become the punishment - you forge ahead! And that's exactly what I will continue to do. I will continue this work to put America First, to get us out of pointless foreign wars, to stop our border from becoming a turnstile, and to serve nobly on the new committee focused on the weaponization of government (something that hits close to home having gone through this...) But, I also know that the attacks won 't end here. We must continue to watch our backs... Because that's where the target is. They will keep coming for me - and for YOU - until they have wiped our movement off the political map. We stop them by standing united. We stop them when patriots like YOU are invested in the mission. Because now, we have PROOF that we can outlast their attacks... | "JOIN THE FIGHT!" | "SUPPORT THE AMERICA-FIRST MOVEMENT!" | Thanks for being in my corner, | | Matt Gaetz Florida's 1st Congressional District | | | | | | | | | | | | mattgaetz.com | "SUPPORT TEAM GAETZ IN 2023!" | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | | Copyright(C) 2023 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Fixing Jackson – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132820?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Mississippi’s legislature has focused a lot on Jackson this session.**

A bill that could have helped create more Charter Schools died in committee. Another seeking to give voters the power to recall elected officials never made it. Lawmakers apparently did not have time to consider a Parents’ Bill of Rights or reforms that might improve health care in our state either.

What they did manage was to find plenty of time to consider how to fix the state of our state capital.

With Jackson’s water supply reliably unreliable, Senator David Parker introduced a bill that establishes a new regional water authority, run by a board appointed by city and state leaders. Then there was legislation introduced to give the Capitol police in Jackson jurisdiction across the whole city, rather than over a few blocks downtown. Legal measures were also approved to create a court system for the newly extended policing area.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=02b9b6fe37&e=5703353baa)
---
_How to protect women’s sports against ‘woke’ ideologues – book your place today!_
| **“Good”, I hear you say. “Jackson’s a mess and time spent trying to fix these things is time well spent.” **

Our capital certainly has one of the highest homicide rates per person in America. Last year, 133 people were murdered in the city. Anything that provides us with more effective law enforcement and a better system of public prosecution deserves support.

Then there is the persistent problem with Jackson’s water supply. As someone that works downtown, I can confirm that the sludge that flows from the faucets is the same sepia color as before. Anything that means a city of 150,000 people might at last have reliable running water has to be a good thing, right?

**For years, of course, the mainstream media attacked Mississippi’s leaders for not concerning themselves with what was going on in Jackson.** Remember when Jackson’s water troubles hit the national headlines last year? There was no shortage of commentators on hand to inform the rest of America that it was all down to the failure of state officials for not getting involved. **Donna Ladd even suggested to NBC News that the lack of running water in the city was “a direct legacy of white-supremacist thinking at the state level”. Really. **

Now that state officials are actively seeking to fix some of the state capital’s problems, of course, the mainstream media throws out precisely the same kind of accusations. **CNN recently informed us that creating a functioning court system for the city “smacks of a modern-day Jim Crow regime”. **

Attacked when they do. Attacked when they don’t. I have a great deal of sympathy for state officials who get vilified for leadership failings that are 100 percent made in Jackson.

**That said, conservatives should think carefully before stepping in with state power to try to fix local-level incompetence. Why?**

Each time that the state government steps in, what they are doing is fixing specific problems caused by municipal failure. They aren’t addressing the underlying causes of that failure, which is a lack of accountability. **Stepping in to do what city officials cannot or will not do might even make the accountability problem worse.**

**Thirty years ago back in my native Britain, Margaret Thatcher faced a similar problem.** Although elected Prime Minister with a large majority, in certain parts of the country local government was in the hands of those that were known as the ‘looney Left’. **The ‘looney Left’ were often so incompetent they could not run a bath.**

Eventually, Mrs Thatcher felt she had to intervene, taking steps to prevent the ‘looney Left’ destroying the cities that they ran. Her interventions might have improved things in the short term, but it caused a long term strategic problem for conservatives.

**First, it put back the day when people in those badly run areas had to face the consequences of how they voted.** If anything, people knew that they could carry on voting the way they did safe in the knowledge that central government would intervene before anything got out of hand.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2c06015d7b&e=5703353baa)
---
_How to improve healthcare in Mississippi – watch Dr Lee Gross at our recent event_
| **Second, it played into the hands of local politicians whose whole schtick was to foster grievances, as opposed to run things competently. Having an outside authority step in to take responsibility not only lets the grievance-mongers off the hook.** It gives them a whole new set of real or imagined grievances to complain about, assisted by a media only too willing to amplify those grievances. (See the media coverage after Governor Reeves restored Jackson’s water supply for details).

Third, conservatives who see state intervention as the solution to Jackson’s multiple municipal failings ought to ask themselves how far they might be willing to go. **If new state structures are the answer to the city’s water problems, why not create a similar system to oversee the airport? If we now have a new court system, why not a new structure to run the city’s failing schools? **

**No conservative would want the federal government to step in and run our state. We should be cautious about having the state government intrude too far into municipal affairs either.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=600b2b4189&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18888?t=1001&akid=2988%2E346206%2EXrfTDc ][IMG]

Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little
bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress, but we’ve got just a
little bit left to go. If you could give just $20 right now to help us pay
it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the
Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the
link: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18888?t=1002&akid=2988%2E346206%2EXrfTDc ]https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18862?t=1003&akid=2988%2E346206%2EXrfTDc

Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP
spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were
doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising
investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were
making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might
that the funding will come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign
has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton
of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important
supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18888?t=1004&akid=2988%2E346206%2EXrfTDc ]Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to help us retire our
debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker,
and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now,
we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230218-2988-footer&t=1005&refcode2=2988_346206_XrfTDc&akid=2988%2E346206%2EXrfTDc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2988%2E346206%2EXrfTDc

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: MSNBC PROJECTS: RUBEN GALLEO (AZ-SEN).
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It’s late Tuesday night, November 5, 2024. You’re watching the election returns come in whether TV or online, with friends or alone, and you see it flash across the screen.
#

Peter -
Think about it.
It’s late Tuesday night, November 5, 2024. You’re watching the election returns come in whether TV or online, with friends or alone, and you see it flash across the screen.
**MSNBC PROJECTS: RUBEN GALLEO (AZ-SEN).**
Soak it in. Envision the smile on your face. It probably means we won the presidency in Arizona, as well. It looks like a good night. No more Senator Sinema.
All that’s left is Kari Lake and Rudy Giuliani screaming it was all rigged.
We won. We did it.
But please know this. Elections aren’t won on election night. In a race like this, it’s the foundation that matters.
It’s our first reporting period. It’s getting in the air first with the ability to sustain it. It's early organizing.
That’s why we ask so often now. So when Ruben wins on November 5, 2024, think about the donation you made today. Please.

clean_body: It’s late Tuesday night, November 5, 2024. You’re watching the election returns come in whether TV or online, with friends or alone, and you see it flash across the screen. Peter - Think about it. It’s late Tuesday night, November 5, 2024. You’re watching the election returns come in whether TV or online, with friends or alone, and you see it flash across the screen. MSNBC PROJECTS: RUBEN GALLEO (AZ-SEN). Soak it in. Envision the smile on your face. It probably means we won the presidency in Arizona, as well. It looks like a good night. No more Senator Sinema. All that’s left is Kari Lake and Rudy Giuliani screaming it was all rigged. We won. We did it. But please know this. Elections aren’t won on election night. In a race like this, it’s the foundation that matters. It’s our first reporting period. It’s getting in the air first with the ability to sustain it. It's early organizing. That’s why we ask so often now. So when Ruben wins on November 5, 2024, think about the donation you made today. Please. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** You don’t have to donate every time we ask. But we hope you’ll choose this time to help us catch up on our fundraising goals when we need it most. Ruben Gallego for AZ Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

This device is also great for recovering stolen items... because it shows you the exact location of whatever you attach it to. Normally USD 79... But be warned... Once they clear out these overstock units... this deal disappears. – while you still can. | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by admin@thetacticaldeals.com 514 Earth City Plz, Ste 310, Earth City, MT 63045 US | | | | ---|---|---

subject: Tuesday’s primary may be the most-watched judicial election ever … and you can help
body:
Primary on Tuesday!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13a6a5d2-bcb0-4c20-b3ed-a4394d8ab2c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**Democracy's on the line this Tuesday. _One Supreme Court race in Wisconsin--by delivering a 4-3 liberal majority or 4-3 MAGA majority--could decide which party controls the White House & House of Representatives._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T430f87b3-7621-489c-b4c1-8cb701ba9f3d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e68e39d-176b-4430-9558-3f1a1a981bfd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_In other words, the race could determine whether we remain a republic._** _Wisconsin Democrats did a great job explaining this._ _From an email of theirs_ : **_The future of democracy runs right through our Supreme Court. In 2020, the WI Supreme Court rejected Trump’s effort to throw out thousands of votes on a narrow 4-3 vote. If just one justice ruled differently, our electoral votes could have gone to Trump._**

**Wisconsin’s Supreme Court protected democracy for the whole country – but only just barely. We can’t afford to give MAGA extremists a second chance. _T hat’s_ _why all eyes are on our state and this race.__ _****_It’s also why we need to elect a pro-democracy justice who will defend voting rights._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T26d46d11-6035-44d6-8746-d8791328a08f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _This Court also decides if the ridiculously gerrymandered congressional district lines can stay--lines that make it so Democrats win a majority of the vote and may only get one third of the seats. If we want real democracy. This. Can't. Stand._ [**_Please, Blue Amp Action community, let's each give $5, $10, $25 or whatever we can to stop the GOP from using Wisconsin as the staging ground for a coup_.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfdbe07cf-0af3-4059-bf6c-a35c94f7a475/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for our democracy. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c7086a1-4970-4694-8bfd-5a440931dc57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Josh Harder
subject: the GOP’s culture wars
body:
I want to tell you the worst kept secret in Washington. Republicans in Congress know their policy ideas aren’t actually popular (see cutting Social Security). So like any practiced politician they change the topic to something much more sinister - the culture wars. Dividing our country on social issues isn’t new. However, there is one important difference today - with the rise of social media and misinformation these lies spread much quicker and empower extremists to a whole new level. subject: This is why they’re attacking me

body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | Change takes courage.

It’s something I’ve learned in both business and government, and it’s something I knew bringing new conservative solutions to Florida as governor.
Now, I’m taking on the Washington insiders to change the way Congress works. We have to STOP business as usual in Washington and that starts by making our government work for YOU, not the Washington insiders.
_Because I have advocated for change, they have put a target on my back._
**I don’t care whose toes I step on. I wasn't elected to represent the Washington insiders - I was elected to represent the people of Florida.**

My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. During the height of the pandemic Pfizer, dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government. | | | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkFFvgyAUhX-Nvmn0AmIffOhmu2RJn5Y2vjUI10oqaChucb9-aLYlGyEk9zvnXuBglRe84ARoWcaqoiDyTsa6ggxIBnmZsywjLBWSk5y3YWWAlGURzdAIPaSdQ_S9tnd0KtRLKkcT91VBcSdxJ3YtbQVCwTKCUqJinLaUlTQeqt776RGRfQTHsNVohcdUGHRaCjvoFp1futmqdWIwTO-JsCqZOv2JLgmIHGdvro9xdhIjUv_RIyhW0aDSc3DW64SNSGEmoW82MNMGJsw4Wx8qYD-O0XrckJVDQtlB2aY5mTrI1_AsFYR_sNcq_KNm-8sbb9w9dpWaPvQw6EfBQ063Lac1lnD3oLulivhTBLC1AWwJwOzJRZzPJ7ckr4cmeWEXuK0iPIfTLxP-Or-HpFv8K-X1F_njjso)
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkEFrhDAQhX-N3hSdqHEPHra1Wyj0tOyyPZWYTDSsRsnGLfbXd5S20IYQmO-9mSQPq7TgBWeQlWWoqgxEqmVoKkiAJZCWaZ4kLI-F5CzlDa0EMMuTIEtwEKaPtUP0nbFXdIrqJZbjEHYVKzRvEDMoQWdNyXaS6x1PmJbYFAzTsK8676dbwPYBHGir0QqPsRjQGSlsbxp0ftGzVetEMkz3SFgVTdp8oosIscPsh_fbODuJAav_6AEUqzigMjM563XCRqQYJmFaS2xoiIlhnK2nCvIfx2g9bsjKProfW87esnP3QPI7PUuR8A92RtE_6nx_PvKLu4auUtOH6XtzKzjl1G45rbHQ3b3RSxVwaoStDWBLAGbPzuJ0enVL9PJ0iZ7zM7SrCI90-mXCX-f3kHiLf6W8_gK5K46U) Dear Friend,

I’m sure by now you’ve seen James O’Keefe’s investigation that exposed Pfizer for working to create a deadlier variant of COVID19.

Within weeks of James releasing that report, his organization, Project Veritas, is in disarray and James’ board of directors has placed him on paid leave.

**It’s no coincidence that this occurred right after they exposed one of the largest industries in the world. These people will CRUSH anyone who stands in their way.**

[**I’m asking for your help to expose Pfizer’s power in politics by funding a series of ads that . . . . TELLS . . . . THE . . .TRUTH.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkEFvhCAQhX-N3jQ4qLAHD9vabdJkT81u99YgjEpW0LDYxv31RdM2aQkhme-9GeBhlZWsZBRyzmNV5SCyVsa6AgKUQMazghBapEIymrEmLAKYFyTKCRqhh7R1iL7X9opOhXpJ5WjivpI5cgnIywY47kgLLVkLTgVvmMpYPFS999MtovsIDmGr0QqPqTDotBR20A06v7SzVevEYJg-EmFVMrX6ji4JiB5mb95v4-wkRrT-o0dQrqJBpefgrNcJG5HCTEJ3NjDTBCbMOFsfKih-HKP1uCErhyTHOz-edt3bEuT38CwVhH-w1yr8oy7251d2cdfYVWr61MOgbyULOXVbTmss4e5Bt0sVsYcIYGsD2BKA2dOzOJ2Obkleni7Jc3GGbhXhMZx-mfDX-T0k3eJfKau_APZejv4)

[**Please donate today.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkFFvgyAUhX-Nvmn0AmIffOjmumTJnpo2fWsQsJIKGsQ17tfvarYlGyEkfOdwgKOrvOAFJ0DLMlYVBZG3MjYVZEAyyMucZRlhqZCc5LzBkYGmLItopq0wfdp6rUNn3F17hfsllYONu4rJhkhFd4RLQjllpCwooQKjJC1IuYv7qgthnCKyj-CAUw1OBJ0Kq72RwvWm0T4s7ezUmoiG8SMRTiVjaz61TxCRwxzsdRpmL3VE6j96BMUqWq3MjM56TdiIFHYU5uaQ2QaZsMPsAu6A_TgGF_SGnOyT-UhHunvsJ4HyFZ-lUPgHO6PwHzXbn4_84u-xr9T4MH1vpoJjT7etp7UWvLs37VJF_CkC2I4BbA3AHMhZnE7vfkneXi7JKzvDbRXhGdewjPrX-R2SbvWvlNdfcjaN5w)

I take this very personally. James is a friend and I’m one of the first executive directors of Project Veritas, helping James get the organization off the ground and thriving for seven years.

As a Marine Corps veteran, our motto “Semper Fidelis” – “Always Faithful” will always ring true in my heart when applied to the Corps, my family and my friends.

In politics, there is an infinitesimally small group of men and women who are true believers that fight for Liberty. We’re not in it for the money, fame, power, etc. Most of us try and stay under the radar so we can support each other without the distractions of the media or attacks by the Left (they always still come every once in a while).

**We are a small group, and we are family – and always faithful to each other.**

Mess with one of us, **and you mess with all of us.**

Now, my SuperPAC, American Liberty Fund, is jumping into this fight with everything we have.

My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. During the height of the pandemic, Pfizer dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government.

From town mayors to U.S. Senators, checks were cut from Pfizer to buy their silence as they experimented with their plans that were exposed by James O’Keefe.

And let’s not fail to mention Pfizer’s hard lobbying to stop what they call “dangerous” drug price controls. What’s more dangerous? Stopping a company from ripping off sick people, or charging $225k a year for the blockbuster heart drug Vyndaquel?

What kills more people? That answer is obvious.

[**And we’ll be exposing all of this and the links to our elections with your help.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkFFvgyAUhX-NvmnwImIffOjmumRJH7alTbeXBgErraKhuMX--l3NtmQjhITvHA5wdJFkPOMU0jwPVZGCSGoZmgIIUAJJnjBCKIuF5DThFQ4COmUkSInuhGnj2mntG2Mv2incT7Hsu7AplJCkpnyVMiEZqzKSqBSzqzxfSb3KkrAtGu-Ha0DXAWxwqt4Kr2PRaWeksK2ptPNTPVo1J6Jh-IiEVdFQm5t2ESK6GX13vPajkzqg5R89gGwWO63MiM5yTliIFN0gzMki6ypkoutH63EH7MfRW68XZGUbuZft2_l59X47o3zEZykU_sHGKPxHydb7V35wl9AVavg0bWuuGceeTktPcy14d2vqqQj4XQCwHANYGoDR073Y7bZuip4eDtEj28NpFuEeVz8N-tf5HRIv9c-Ul1_syo89)

I’ve been in Washington for over 20 years, so not much shocks me these days, but it may surprise you who took Pfizer political cash as they were pushing out their COVID19 vaccines. And that list is one of the only lists in Washington that includes Pelosi, Schumer, Kevin McCarthy and even Rand Paul.

Your local mayor or state Attorney General may even be on the list.

Pfizer owns almost everyone is Washington.

But they don’t own you, me, James and fighters like us.

[**Help me take a stand and support our work.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkM1ugzAQhJ8GbiBYYyAHDklpKqXKqUqaW2T8A1awQY5JRZ--C2ortZZlab-ZXdsjqzQv8oJAVpahqDJgqeKhriABkkBapjRJCI0ZL0haNLgSkBlNgiyRhuk-Vk5K32l7k05gPcd8MGFXNVQQAgpUSjeNpJATqbJyQ2iaNbngedhXnffjPSDbAPa4xWCZlzEz0mnObK8b6fysJiuWiWgYHxGzIhqV_pQuQkT2kzfX-zA5LgNS_9EDyBfRSKEndNbLhJVwZkamW4vMNMiYGSbrsQL64xislyuyvI_KV3N4vLc7ekT5is8SKPyDnRb4j5puz2_Fxd1CV4nxQ_e9vucF5tSuOS2x4N29VnMVFLsAYG0DWBOAyZMzO52Obo4Oz5fohZ6hXUR4wtPPo_x1fg-J1_gXWtRfNOaOPw) The sooner we can start, the more impact we can make, and we won’t be stopping anytime soon!

With Respect and Gratitude,

Shane Cory
Founder and President
American Liberty Fund

P.S. Since 2016, American Liberty Fund has produced hundreds of ads seen by millions of Americans. We hit hard as we don’t owe any industry or politicians any breaks. We help elect FIGHTERS who love Liberty and our nation **. . . and we expose everyone who works against you and your family.[Support us today!](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkF9rwyAUxT9N8pZgrlGzhzx0yzooDAZbS9-K8U_jGk2wpiP79DNhG2wiwv2dc696VF1QRhmGsqpSWZfACy1SUwMCjKCoCoIQJjkXDBesjQuBKglKSqQsN32uvVKhM-6ivIz1nIvBpl1dUiooJy2gQqNKFkRVpUSEaKHuKCYi7esuhPGa4E0C27jl4HhQObfKG8Fdb1rlw6wnJ5eJ0TDeMu5kNmrzqXwWEd5OwZ6uw-SFSnDzR0-ALqJV0kzR2SwTViK4Hbk5u8hsGxm3w-RCrID8OAYX1Iqc6LMbfacz27286Sif4rNkFP7Bzsj4j4ZsDq_s6C-pr-X4YfreXCmLOZ3XnJZY4t290XOdsPsEYG0DWBOAKeAD3--f_ZztHo_ZEznAeRHhIZ5hHtWv83tIvsa_UNZ8AUwBjnU)**

P.P.S. Again as a former executive director of Project Veritas, I was with James when it was just a me, him and a few volunteers in a room above a garage. I know James O’Keefe well, and I know his passion and heart. I stand with him. But we cannot support Project Veritas until he is brought back on board and the board members who are attempting to oust him **resign in shame.**

I know James O’Keefe well, and I know his passion and heart. I stand with him. But we cannot support Project Veritas until he is brought back on board and the board members who are attempting to oust him resign in shame. name: Pete Sepp
subject: It’s time to stomp the breaks on reckless spending
body:
And now it's at the limit, with Secretary of the Treasury Janet Yellen stating that unless Congress increases

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a534cd71e597472894d25a1bdd1d4279&_e=cuOyBXXVO6cgWjfvDmBlHjGeIEEGMUv1SaS_quJUxnUkUAGnxaXDo4eftsrPEpOzmX5DLn_z59LmoqiLTkrkEoK7f5DzmNAKWdLmnupTCJNw830owhKBK2lDuoDdVxcH1xJtTx5kYlVz9kqhq7LzEWKuROQByAV7n9Qm8jIBWNC3diudAFbs_7EdtQYobvGkwy-T7Hpr4uD24VCnirvG6EdSP9jxD1bEIAw0nWmk3SHP5i4MZ3igKaWuG5t5YNalSG1c3_vvaZFAe1p6QPqYfEH-RCmfjAKsP5WgVK0JdtQ%3D)
**National Debt:

$31,552,713,460,426**

Friend,

And now it's at the limit, with Secretary of the Treasury Janet Yellen stating that unless Congress increases or suspends the national debt limit, this will _**" cause irreparable harm to the U.S. economy, the livelihoods of all Americans, and global financial stability."**_ The "extraordinary measures" the Treasury is now taking to keep meeting legal obligations can only last so long.

My name is Pete Sepp, President of the National Taxpayers Union (NTU), and we are the voice for taxpayers in D.C.

The battle is underway in Congress.

**Congress HAS to cut spending and balance the budget.** If you ran a business like Congress runs the government, you'd be constantly on the edge of financial ruin.

It's time to hold Congress accountable for how they spend YOUR tax dollars, Friend.

That's why NTU is working with members of Congress to push favorable reforms through to get America back on track. To keep pressure on Congress, I need to raise $25,000 by the end of the week to keep our teams in D.C. working hard for you, and for future generations.

[_**Can I count on you to send an urgent donation of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today? Click here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a534cd71e597472894d25a1bdd1d4279&_e=cuOyBXXVO6cgWjfvDmBlHjGeIEEGMUv1SaS_quJUxnUkUAGnxaXDo4eftsrPEpOzmX5DLn_z59LmoqiLTkrkEoK7f5DzmNAKWdLmnupTCJNw830owhKBK2lDuoDdVxcH1xJtTx5kYlVz9kqhq7LzEbXZgrc_mJ2Sgr9psXPi7oh3OOSK7QrpkbmA1QslGoAjnyzJDjWMDz2Wd3Jo9nmOWWtSJToJkffZCOuP_WzN02aTMtBMgih67hsJYGTm2T5DvsiGVVrtpdiZ-vsW1jherFe32wbZ7Aqh0yGHxkq_NQc%3D)

**How did the national debt get so out of control?**
* Soaring U.S. spending, with no cuts in less important programs
* A federal budget that largely runs on autopilot
* A decade of Congress cheating the Budget Control Act caps
* Congressional budget gimmicks that appear to reduce deficits but do not actually represent necessary spending and budget reforms
* A completely broken budget process in Congress that serves taxpayers poorly each and every year

Congress is **recklessly** driving our nation into extreme debt - we need to tell them to STOMP the brakes on runaway spending now.

[_**Can you help us push for budget reform in Congress by sending a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount you can generously afford? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a534cd71e597472894d25a1bdd1d4279&_e=cuOyBXXVO6cgWjfvDmBlHjGeIEEGMUv1SaS_quJUxnUkUAGnxaXDo4eftsrPEpOzmX5DLn_z59LmoqiLTkrkEoK7f5DzmNAKWdLmnupTCJNw830owhKBK2lDuoDdVxcH1xJtTx5kYlVz9kqhq7LzEdbKGM7PpbJ6CpaYlWr2M03iL4dzb2KlHndluuAlLgKGFFrEvrfR1IxADfPXwHvvIyxzdgvmGDzvIEsqV4k-e4-g1ek-MUV0hp53AKgX0rBmjrRF804MR8OZEFF4rHMuj9RI7eBFWkYtN6oc86m3iCc%3D)

The current state of America's debt and deficits illustrates that Congress's addiction to overspending has made the country less safe, secure, and stable.

We need lawmakers to take even modest steps toward more sustainable debt levels. This is where NTU plays a critical role.

Special interests have their lobbyists. But who is working for you, Friend, the taxpayer? We are -- the National Taxpayers Union.

**Since 1969, NTU has proudly been a major player in signature taxpayer victories of the past five decades:**

* We were there when the federal tax code was overhauled under President Reagan in 1986.
* We championed the cause for a "Taxpayer Bill of Rights" in the late 80s and 90s and with follow-on legislation, the 2019 Taxpayer First Act.
* In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform.
* In 2020, our public education arm launched the Taxpayer Defense Center to fight for taxpayers in court. TDC has already helped to hand the IRS major defeats in the Supreme Court.
* We've even been able to push back against tens of billions in additional federal spending hikes - but we have a LONG way to go on that front.

Friend, can you help me reach my goal of $25,000 by the end of the week to keep our teams in D.C. to keep pressure on Congress?

[_**Rush $5 >>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a534cd71e597472894d25a1bdd1d4279&_e=cuOyBXXVO6cgWjfvDmBlHjGeIEEGMUv1SaS_quJUxnUkUAGnxaXDo4eftsrPEpOzmX5DLn_z59LmoqiLTkrkEoK7f5DzmNAKWdLmnupTCJNw830owhKBK2lDuoDdVxcH6oVcUEIBQm4ulZrYryB0kzR6rDj-cWU39Wpmk8vsGjpVZMwqTAN9Kvvxxws1wdQCxpiWXs5xOeZrTkeEeZx8e-i136AC1L49te_leM53m730D0w6qCMRXQvdrqifeROTLGpTu1KaZEad2OTg_orLn_YPOGz_KXacQXMcaEHSyo2lr0CIr9vrbeVOH1_5XgZ_)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
It was the closest race in the entire country.
| | |
---
Hello,
Adam Frisch here, humbly asking if you can make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.
This week, I announced that I am once again running to defeat Boebert. In 2022, the race between us went to a recount, but ultimately, after all of the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short.
It was the closest race in the entire country.
I know we can win this time, but I am counting on your support from day one to be able to build a campaign strong enough to win.
**[So please, click here and split a donation between our campaign and Maggie Hassan to become a Founding Donor to defeat Lauren Boebert. When we kick Boebert out of Congress once and for all, you’ll be able to say you were a part of it from the start.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58898717/392605789/-1786579371?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2213-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjliOTBlYS05Y2FmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=utzrCYoHzCJgZOXfiSunIbKTrzktwd5Solek20f1Vlo=)**
Despite our close race last time, it’s clear that Lauren Boebert hasn’t learned her lesson. The only way to stop her from continuing to fuel the anger-tainment machine is to defeat her at the ballot box.
Thank you for having my back from the start.
With gratitude

– Adam

subject: Staying focused
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
There’s a lot to worry about these days
#
Look, Derek -
There’s been a lot going on in the country lately, and there’s a lot to worry about these days.
But right now, we want you to focus on one thing. Something we’re working hard to stop.
Over in the House, McCarthy and his allies are putting together a list of cuts to social programs that Veterans and their families depend on. And they’re bringing us closer to a default on our debt than we ever should be. The consequences would be devastating.
That’s real, and that’s dangerous for all of us.
But we’re not powerless here — we can fight back. And here at VoteVets, that’s exactly what we’re doing.
[**If you’re with us, please make a $3 donation today and help support our work. Every day, we’re focused on elevating the voices of Veterans and the issues that impact them.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230218-1-15&t=1&akid=7362%2E3013755%2E5EBgM3)

name: The Giffords Team
subject: Some good news for your Saturday morning
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A powerful tool proven to save lives.
#

Friends -
Thanks to the passage of the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ last summer, the Justice Department is currently in the process of distributing **_over $200 million**_ to states across the country to better implement extreme risk protection orders, aka red flag laws.
Extreme risk laws are key in helping to keep guns out of the wrong hands by allowing a court to temporarily remove firearms from the possession of someone who poses a risk of violence to others or themselves.
Far too often, we’ve seen mass shootings occur because a perpetrator had access to a firearm despite numerous warning signs, such as a history of violent behavior or threatening comments. With correct implementation, extreme risk laws can help address this problem and save lives.
We’re proud to have helped pass the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ and to see this action being taken. We look forward to watching more elements of this transformative legislation package get put into action soon.
**But in the meantime, there’s still so much work to be done to keep our communities safe and your support is a big part of how we get it done. So please:**
[**Will you chip in to Giffords today to help us continue the fight to end gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230218-1-15&t=1&akid=4280%2E3935704%2EMCIOxW)
