name: Right Side America on Behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
Please view this message from our sponsor.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62336899:JuxrbWGNa:m:1:3331421248:6D7D686173A4445014C25B223250BC87:r) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62336899:JuxrbWGNa:m:1:3331421248:6D7D686173A4445014C25B223250BC87:r "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/") Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62336899:JuxrbWGNa:m:1:3331421248:6D7D686173A4445014C25B223250BC87:r) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62336899:JuxrbWGNa:m:1:3331421248:6D7D686173A4445014C25B223250BC87:r)
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system July 9, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJuxrbWGNa). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJuxrbWGNa)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJuxrbWGNa) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-52723014181-echo7-4FF90F56741364FEFB372F54E0F733A3@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine.

They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6k12nr7n64rald6407m0rbmhn6ob0gbkqde6et8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctim4oj4c1h2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za7gq8rc948gi97htfvsu1nml5g0lsgglf52128o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctim4oj4c1h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znds1cc0gvelljckcrinli0r3k3m0h7ek1b2870o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctim4oj4c1h2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zut7kn7180bf24a46kg6t7asiu2vgq2dp4nrhb7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctim4oj4c1h2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z73ss2011hso8jvini26gdf2jrnqufsmo7e952l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctim4oj4c1h2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaoal2fai516ojfplei5fdf6ioicnmp6pkb5vq5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3ctim4oj4c1h2bs)

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time Outrageously, there’s more. Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment! This can’t go on. I won’t allow it. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can’t do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit. clean_body: Democrats are facing our first major test of 2023 | | Peter, The first special election of 2023 is just three days away in VA-04! Democrat Jennifer McClellan is running to keep an open seat blue and become the first Black woman to represent Virginia in Congress! Early voting is already underway, and Jennifer is in a sprint to make sure everyone knows about this critical special election on Feb. 21st. With just a handful of seats making up the Republican Majority in Congress, we need to be able to help Jennifer keep critical districts blue and STOP the GOP from expanding their majority. This is our first major test of 2023, and our chance to start paving the way for FLIPPING the House in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and split evenly between Becca Balint and Jennifer McClellan. | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = As a state legislator, Jenn helped make Virginia the first state in the South to proactively expand reproductive rights by leading the passage of the Reproductive Health Protection Act, which eliminated mandatory ultrasounds, 24-hour waiting periods, and TRAP laws. With such narrow margins in the House, we need every Democrat we can get to advance commonsense policies while holding the line against the extreme agenda of far-right Republicans. = Let’s win! Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58902837/392622142/265476937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTI2NTQ0Yy1hNWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQFA449_gaKQixDSNpWmxBEoQnXYHkTbAfu5yXB6-Bk=)

**Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our right to choose. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 592 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58902838/392622150/1753456815?code=jtk977-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTI2NTQ0Yy1hNWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQFA449_gaKQixDSNpWmxBEoQnXYHkTbAfu5yXB6-Bk=&emci=0b334f0e-8fa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8e26544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect the right to choose.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down this summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House now under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58902840/392622165/1753456815?code=jtk977-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTI2NTQ0Yy1hNWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQFA449_gaKQixDSNpWmxBEoQnXYHkTbAfu5yXB6-Bk=&emci=0b334f0e-8fa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8e26544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58902841/392622168/1753456815?code=jtk977-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTI2NTQ0Yy1hNWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQFA449_gaKQixDSNpWmxBEoQnXYHkTbAfu5yXB6-Bk=&emci=0b334f0e-8fa9-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8e26544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Peter — A few days ago, I let you know about the plan by right-wing state Supreme Court justices to reopen cases that have already been decided. **It’s clear that folks like you are just as appalled by this reversal of precedent as I am.** Reversing decisions when new justices are elected is antithetical to the idea of an independent judicial system. Our Court is supposed to work as a check and balance to the other branches of government. Instead, these right-wing justices appear prepared to do the bidding of Republican legislative leaders. **[I’m furious at this attack on our democracy, and I need you to join me and take action. Please, add your name to my petition calling on the Court to UPHOLD judicial independence — not simply bow to the whims of Republican legislators. Click here to sign on>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58902848/392622206/1551641338?refcode=ea.8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI2NTQ0Yy1hNWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGmz68LFPrVnv8B30v2Ltuv-PTZZuHH0pMfD0agUpDE=&emci=143b2459-d6ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** By reopening critical cases whose decisions struck down Republicans' anti-voter legislation and ultra-gerrymandered legislative district maps, the Court’s right-wing justices are essentially pledging loyalty to the GOP. This is just the first step in the Republican plans to undermine our state constitution and create a subservient judiciary. And if the Court’s new decisions favor the GOP (which we must assume they will), we’ll have an even harder time reigning in Republican extremism. **[Our democracy is at stake. I need you to sign my petition before the weekend is over, Peter. Tell the Court to uphold judicial independence>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58902849/392622207/1551641338?refcode=ea.8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI2NTQ0Yy1hNWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGmz68LFPrVnv8B30v2Ltuv-PTZZuHH0pMfD0agUpDE=&emci=143b2459-d6ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58902850/392622208/1551641338?refcode=ea.8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDI2NTQ0Yy1hNWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IGmz68LFPrVnv8B30v2Ltuv-PTZZuHH0pMfD0agUpDE=&emci=143b2459-d6ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=8426544c-a5af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

clean_body: Sign on >>>>>>>>> | Peter — A few days ago, I let you know about the plan by right-wing state Supreme Court justices to reopen cases that have already been decided. It’s clear that folks like you are just as appalled by this reversal of precedent as I am. Reversing decisions when new justices are elected is antithetical to the idea of an independent judicial system. Our Court is supposed to work as a check and balance to the other branches of government. Instead, these right-wing justices appear prepared to do the bidding of Republican legislative leaders. By reopening critical cases whose decisions struck down Republicans' anti-voter legislation and ultra-gerrymandered legislative district maps, the Court’s right-wing justices are essentially pledging loyalty to the GOP. This is just the first step in the Republican plans to undermine our state constitution and create a subservient judiciary. And if the Court’s new decisions favor the GOP (which we must assume they will), we’ll have an even harder time reigning in Republican extremism. | Thank you, Roy ****=** **=** Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. AOC goes viral for mocking Jesus Christ...
When a Christian group spread the word of Christ to millions in an ad during the game last Sunday, AOC took to Twitter to slam it.
She called Christ's Holy Word "fascist."
**Now her post has been seen by over 19 MILLION people.**
The anti-God Woke Mob has never had a victory like this.
They're foaming at the mouth to humiliate Christians all across the country.
And the sad truth is that AOC and her allies on the left are winning.
The percentage of Americans who identify as Christian is already at an all-time low.
We're organizing an immediate & overwhelming Christian response that needs to happen right now.
And all were asking is for an answer to this question:
**[Does God still belong in America?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62336921:6hW_bWGJN:m:1:3331421248:1F4263234ED1B26AE94DFE22E757B402:r)**

body:
Republicans are not serious about helping working families. Plain and simple.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58906780/392629288/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230218-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzY0ZGY0Yy1hYmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHtFvO_5nGfFH06BgMHN8p-38yzP1DsigMFieIdQq4M=)
---
| Peter,

Here’s the deal:

Republicans are not serious about helping working families. Plain and simple.

As we approach the deadline to prevent a debt ceiling breach, Republicans are intent on cutting spending on Social Security and Medicare.

[_**We simply can’t let that happen.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58906781/392629289/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230218-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzY0ZGY0Yy1hYmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHtFvO_5nGfFH06BgMHN8p-38yzP1DsigMFieIdQq4M=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58906782/392629290/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230218-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzY0ZGY0Yy1hYmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHtFvO_5nGfFH06BgMHN8p-38yzP1DsigMFieIdQq4M=)
---
Sure, they might have accused President Biden of lying at the State of the Union...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58906783/392629291/669571684?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230218-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzY0ZGY0Yy1hYmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OHtFvO_5nGfFH06BgMHN8p-38yzP1DsigMFieIdQq4M=)
But the evidence is there. Not only have they introduced legislation to repeal the Inflation Reduction Act, but some Republicans have _**ACTUALLY**_ gone on record saying they plan on cutting back on these essential programs.

This type of disregard for the working class is the reason why Valerie Foushee ran for Congress. And today, she is working with Democrats to put our families first.

name: Sign the petition (Left Action)
subject: Tell Advertisers to Dump Fox News: Sign the Petition
body:

| | | **[Tell Advertisers to Dump Fox News](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2c66f31-22be-4ba6-871f-3cbbf32868b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T346815ce-d532-4202-9aa3-caf0d212ba1b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | For years, Fox News has been stoking the fires of extremism and hatred, and spewing lies nonstop. And as recently [released text messages showed](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc39ca9d7-290b-41ca-88de-1f1658dd43e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), even _Fox_ doesn't believe its own BS.

**But those messages also showed that Fox is terrified of losing ad revenue.** **And with good reason -- without advertisers, Fox would go out of business.**

[**Let's make it happen. Add your name, demand that advertisers cut their ties NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75eecd8b-e6cf-47b9-bf14-04d7e80cb3e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

It's the right thing to do, and if these advertisers give a damn about their fellow human beings and their country, they'll do it. And even if they don't care about those things, we know they care about lost sales. So let's show them there will be a whole lot of pissed off consumers if they don't adjust their ad budgets accordingly.

[**Sign now: Tell Advertisers to Dump Fox News**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee976271-f916-49a0-a383-fd165614f011/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: A.G. Holder
subject: I'll cut right to the chase, team.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Too many ideologues have already gone to extreme lengths to maintain power against the wishes of the American people through the use of partisan and racial gerrymandering. Now, they are going even further to achieve their unpopular political aims.
[**Will you make a contribution to All On The Line?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58919855/392662431/2105777232?refcode=20230219_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNDEwZjk0LWQ3YWYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IFhD0KQrPY__1aWeS1i3qXpe7hGWDINGpRzkXAsKC8Y=)
North Carolina Republicans are attempting to use their state’s highest court to reverse an established precedent that resulted in fair maps. If you're already familiar with _Harper v. Hall_ , you know that our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, initiated this landmark case that struck down gerrymandered congressional and state legislative maps.
The North Carolina Supreme Court has consistently sided with fair maps as recently as just a few weeks ago. But these extreme Republicans cynically think that the new court majority will now side with them -- not because they have a better case, but because some of the justices belong to their political party.
I'll cut right to the chase -- if the North Carolina Supreme Court reverses decisions made -- by the same court -- as recently as weeks ago, it will do irreversible damage to the judicial branch.
Republicans in North Carolina are hoping to use the Court to attain their ultimate goal: to gerrymander with impunity. We can’t let that happen. We need supporters like you to help us keep up the fight for fairness and voter protection.
[**Can you contribute to All On The Line today to help our work to safeguard our democracy against this brazen attempt to undermine judicial independence?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58919856/392662432/2105777232?refcode=20230219_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNDEwZjk0LWQ3YWYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IFhD0KQrPY__1aWeS1i3qXpe7hGWDINGpRzkXAsKC8Y=)
Justices are supposed to serve as independent jurists. Overturning a decision made just a few weeks ago would be an action so baldly political that it would rightly call into question the legitimacy of the state’s highest court.
This will weaken our system of checks and balances. State supreme courts have been one of the last lines of defense against gerrymandering and voter suppression laws passed by Republican-controlled state legislatures.
[**Help us defend American democracy, fair maps, and voter protection laws. Give $15, $35, or $50 if you’re able -- whatever amount works for you. If there was ever a time to help us, that time is now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58919857/392662433/2105777232?refcode=20230219_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEwNDEwZjk0LWQ3YWYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IFhD0KQrPY__1aWeS1i3qXpe7hGWDINGpRzkXAsKC8Y=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

\-- Eric H. Holder, Jr.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: You have my word, I’ll always tell it to you straight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58914037/392637652/1180693028?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.18_b1_gs_all&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWExZjFmMmMtYjFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=__tfVRct0MFwbL1-HYoh3mTFZvuaaA2WHIPnutQN1-I=) Hey team –

**I’ll be blunt: In November, I ran in one of the toughest races in the whole country.**

In 2022 – after the GOP tried to rig the maps in Arizona – the nonpartisan Cook Political Report moved their rating for AZ-04 toward Republicans. **Despite GOP meddling, and thanks to this grassroots team, we kept the seat blue.

[I hope you’ll let me explain why I need your help to keep AZ-04 blue again, but if you’re already with me, you can chip in $4 now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58914038/392637653/1180693028?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.18_b1_gs_all&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWExZjFmMmMtYjFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=__tfVRct0MFwbL1-HYoh3mTFZvuaaA2WHIPnutQN1-I=)** | [CHIP IN $4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58914039/392637654/1180693028?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.18_b1_gs_all&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWExZjFmMmMtYjFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=__tfVRct0MFwbL1-HYoh3mTFZvuaaA2WHIPnutQN1-I=)
---
I’ve never been focused on scoring political points or giving a nice speech: My singular focus in Congress is on making your life better. That’s why I’m committed to leading bipartisan efforts in the House, like funding for infrastructure investment and relief for small businesses after the pandemic.

Unfortunately, MAGA Republicans don’t care that I've been working across the aisle to deliver solutions for Arizonans. **Now Kelly Cooper, the MAGA Republican who nearly beat me last year, has announced he plans to run against me again!

[This race isn’t going to be cheap, and with Cooper running again, it’s clear that this could be one of my toughest elections yet. Will you chip in $4 to help me keep AZ-04 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58914040/392637655/1180693028?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.18_b1_gs_all&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWExZjFmMmMtYjFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=__tfVRct0MFwbL1-HYoh3mTFZvuaaA2WHIPnutQN1-I=)**
[CHIP IN $4](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58914041/392637656/1180693028?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.18_b1_gs_all&amount=4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWExZjFmMmMtYjFhZi1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=__tfVRct0MFwbL1-HYoh3mTFZvuaaA2WHIPnutQN1-I=)

Thank you!

\-- Greg

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Montana’s GOP wants Jon Tester’s Senate seat. They have a lot of advantages in a state that Trump won by 20 percent, but Sen. Tester has all of us who appreciate his support for working families and can help him get an early start building his campaign.
body:
GOP Senate pickup opportunity
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9333be21-5ebd-44a3-b3cd-3470b19b3a8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _We can't afford to lose Jon Tester’s seat in Montana, in 2024, or we lose the Senate. And 2024 isn’t as far off as it seems. The campaign season is already underway._ _[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T392b29d5-888b-47d0-9d4f-b5cc5f992437/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ _Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. _**_Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat._** He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. [**_Will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T451d1389-11b5-4419-99aa-fea995b60c86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c95a278-28d8-4ec6-aae9-6bec8d1117e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _No huffing and puffing his chest for the cameras. No negotiating on Meet The Press, or, worse, FoxNews. No attacking his own party or bragging about how much he disagrees with it. In other words, the anti-Joe Manchin._ **_Tester, like Manchin, comes from an overwhelming Trump state. Trump won Montana by 20% in 2016, yet Tester still stood up for his progressive values--FOR US--and was reelected in 2018 on his record and very Montana-esque being. He's perfect for the state, and perfect for the Democratic Party._** **_If we don't re-elect Tester, we will lose the Senate._** It's that simple. _And if we don't reward Tester for taking bold, progressive stands, even knowing he'll have to overcome the HUGE Trump lean of his state, then we can expect future Democrats from states like Montana to all be Joe Manchins._ A disaster. [**_So will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta358d572-b55f-4632-a16f-cdd02a696081/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us reelect the good ones in hostile electoral territory._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3751f604-b77f-4f7c-903a-7b859aed87a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/jontester6-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc1df3a0-84fd-4145-bb30-048b7c76125d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=8949b58c-d766-4ca5-916e-7a1d6491bf42&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=8949b58c-d766-4ca5-916e-7a1d6491bf42&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: American Defense News
subject: Cyberstalking Navy Capt. FIRED
body:
And Lawmakers Demand Accountability From Biden Admin After Military Shoots Down 4th Flying Object

|

body:
DOJ states that disqualifying voters based on dating errors violates the Civil Rights Act.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58914644/392639899/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230218MBCRA_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkNjQyMTdkLWI0YWYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Jgu6ohwaFUHbx6yMNUEqucA_-oNTK0-ECIRpXjb7nE=)
| Today, we’re celebrating another huge win, Fellow activist! Last November, the PA GOP won a lawsuit to enforce an unnecessary rule that required a date on the outer envelope of mail-in-ballots. Because of this, more than 16,000 Pennsylvanians’ ballots were rejected — and an overwhelming majority were from Democrats.

Last week, The U.S Department of Justice (DOJ) intervened on a lawsuit challenging this rule. The DOJ stated that errors or omissions on dates do not relate to a voter’s qualification. **Thus, as we said all along, disqualifying voters based on these errors violates the Civil Rights Act.**

**[We were able to make historic gains in the last election despite this addition to the PA GOP’s voter suppression tactics, but they are nothing but persistent in their efforts to find new ways to stifle the Commonwealth’s voters. Can you pitch in $10 right now to help us keep up our work to combat voter suppression and empower those the GOP seeks to silence?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58914645/392639900/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230218MBCRA_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkNjQyMTdkLWI0YWYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Jgu6ohwaFUHbx6yMNUEqucA_-oNTK0-ECIRpXjb7nE=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58914646/392639901/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230218MBCRA_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkNjQyMTdkLWI0YWYtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5Jgu6ohwaFUHbx6yMNUEqucA_-oNTK0-ECIRpXjb7nE=) Pennsylvanians should not have to bend over backwards to cast a ballot, whether it be at the polls or through the mail. Voting should be easy and accessible, without a multitude of rules and regulations that make it harder.

As a voting rights organization, we are facing a double-edged sword. To engage voters, the voting process must be easy and accessible. To make voting easy and accessible, we need to elect leaders who will stand up against attacks on our voting rights. **[The PA GOP knows exactly what they are doing, and that is exactly why we will continue educating our constituents. Will you donate $10 right now to provide us the resources we need to conduct year-round, consistent voter registration, civic engagement and mobilization centering Black, Indigenous, immigrants and clean_body: DOJ states that disqualifying voters based on dating errors violates the Civil Rights Act. = | Today, we’re celebrating another huge win, Fellow activist! Last November, the PA GOP won a lawsuit to enforce an unnecessary rule that required a date on the outer envelope of mail-in-ballots. Because of this, more than 16,000 Pennsylvanians’ ballots were rejected — and an overwhelming majority were from Democrats. Last week, The U.S Department of Justice (DOJ) intervened on a lawsuit challenging this rule. The DOJ stated that errors or omissions on dates do not relate to a voter’s qualification. Thus, as we said all along, disqualifying voters based on these errors violates the Civil Rights Act. = = Pennsylvanians should not have to bend over backwards to cast a ballot, whether it be at the polls or through the mail. Voting should be easy and accessible, without a multitude of rules and regulations that make it harder. As a voting rights organization, we are facing a double-edged sword. To engage voters, the voting process must be easy and accessible. To make voting easy and accessible, we need to elect leaders who will stand up against attacks on our voting rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: If you’re ready to get to work, then make a donation of $7 to the Democratic National Committee to elect more Democrats.

We’re at an inflection point, one of those moments that only a few generations ever face. The direction we take is going to decide the course of this nation for decades to come. | |

You’ve heard me say it before: We’re at an inflection point, one of those moments that only a few generations ever face. The direction we take is going to decide the course of this nation for decades to come. It’s always been my vision that we rebuild the backbone of America -- America's middle class -- and unite the country. **We’ve gotten a lot done, Derek, but we need to finish the job.** Grassroots donations last year and in years prior made all the difference in electing Democrats nationwide. Think about what a gift of $7 can do to power our work in 2023. That’s why I’m coming to you directly: **If you’re ready to get to work, then make a donation of $7 to the Democratic National Committee. They’re fighting to elect Democrats in every corner of our great country and helping build a better America.**

clean_body: We’re at an inflection point, one of those moments that only a few generations ever face. The direction we take is going to decide the course of this nation for decades to come. | | You’ve heard me say it before: We’re at an inflection point, one of those moments that only a few generations ever face. The direction we take is going to decide the course of this nation for decades to come. It’s always been my vision that we rebuild the backbone of America -- America's middle class -- and unite the country. We’ve gotten a lot done, Derek, but we need to finish the job. Grassroots donations last year and in years prior made all the difference in electing Democrats nationwide. Think about what a gift of $7 can do to power our work in 2023. That’s why I’m coming to you directly: If you’re ready to get to work, then make a donation of $7 to the Democratic National Committee. They’re fighting to elect Democrats in every corner of our great country and helping build a better America. Together, we capped the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors on Medicare. Let's finish the job and cap the cost of insulin for everybody at $35. Together, we passed the Inflation Reduction Act \-- the most significant investment ever in fighting climate change -- lowering utility bills, creating American jobs, and leading the world towards a clean energy future. There’s more to do, and we’ve got to finish the job. Understand this, Derek: Social Security and Medicare are lifelines for millions of seniors. So let's stand up for seniors and show them we will not cut Social Security, we will not cut Medicare. If anyone tries to cut Social Security, if anyone tries to cut Medicare, I'll stop them. I'll veto it. And make no mistake about it, if Congress passes a national abortion ban, I will veto it. Congress must protect the rights from Roe v. Wade. We the people are facing the test of our time. We have to be the nation we have always been -- a nation that embraces light over darkness, hope over fear, stability over chaos. We have to see each other as fellow Americans. We are good people. We are the only nation in the world built on an idea. The only one. Thank you, and God bless you. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. subject: Sinema abandoned you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
apparently leaving the Democratic Party wasn’t enough for Kyrsten Sinema

| | Peter, apparently leaving the Democratic Party wasn’t enough for Kyrsten Sinema... _Now, she’s being courted by Senate Republicans._ | **Independent Sinema Courted by GOP as Democrat Ruben Gallego Steps Up**
---
Democrats (like you!) worked hard to save our Senate majority in Arizona.

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: My bipartisan bill to increase health care access for children:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
As a pediatrician, I've seen firsthand how important access to a primary care doctor is for children's well-being. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58915019/392641299/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWZkYzcwZi1iNmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rAEML4Ice-27YobgjZCdukhIexjmozhlWEhSUpIEaE=&emci=d90f63b2-d5ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4afdc70f-b6af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

As a pediatrician, I've seen firsthand how important access to a primary care doctor is for children's well-being. Yet right now, too many American children don't have access to the quality, affordable care they need.

**That's why last week, I was proud to introduce the _Kids' Access to Primary Care Act_ in the House.** This bipartisan legislation would strengthen Medicaid to provide increased access to primary care for children and their families.

If passed, this bill will ensure Medicaid pays at least the same rate as Medicare. This would mean access to more doctors, shorter waiting periods, and overall increased health care coverage for children and families.

With nearly half of the children in the United States being insured through Medicaid, this bill is critical to ensuring our children receive the care they deserve.

**[If you're with me in the fight to improve health care access for children, add your name now to become a citizen co-sponsor of my _Kids' Access to Primary Care Act_ >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58915021/392641301/-1227338212?ms=em23_230218_medica_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&refcode=em23_230218_medica_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&source=em23_230218_medica_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230218_medica_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=qtRcPp4mFrkL2qXhJr+w43++t8bDNWUUzgnhF7oQCPJYmlB7MDPXHktJkUzZdmdj909Dj6e/efVGwjxlBNr3foHuNO6r4z6HnDoEswz8JDG/8Es30OiHIgBa01cJoEvKsMKGQQevns+DdAuJtJTq9xyI0rlYKPHNQvilx+rxSp4=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWZkYzcwZi1iNmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rAEML4Ice-27YobgjZCdukhIexjmozhlWEhSUpIEaE=&emci=d90f63b2-d5ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4afdc70f-b6af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)** | [BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58915023/392641303/-1227338212?ms=em23_230218_medica_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&refcode=em23_230218_medica_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&source=em23_230218_medica_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230218_medica_engg_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=qtRcPp4mFrkL2qXhJr+w43++t8bDNWUUzgnhF7oQCPJYmlB7MDPXHktJkUzZdmdj909Dj6e/efVGwjxlBNr3foHuNO6r4z6HnDoEswz8JDG/8Es30OiHIgBa01cJoEvKsMKGQQevns+DdAuJtJTq9xyI0rlYKPHNQvilx+rxSp4=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWZkYzcwZi1iNmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rAEML4Ice-27YobgjZCdukhIexjmozhlWEhSUpIEaE=&emci=d90f63b2-d5ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4afdc70f-b6af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

clean_body: As a pediatrician, I've seen firsthand how important access to a primary care doctor is for children's well-being. Peter, As a pediatrician, I've seen firsthand how important access to a primary care doctor is for children's well-being. Yet right now, too many American children don't have access to the quality, affordable care they need. That's why last week, I was proud to introduce the Kids' Access to Primary Care Act in the House. This bipartisan legislation would strengthen Medicaid to provide increased access to primary care for children and their families. If passed, this bill will ensure Medicaid pays at least the same rate as Medicare. This would mean access to more doctors, shorter waiting periods, and overall increased health care coverage for children and families. With nearly half of the children in the United States being insured through Medicaid, this bill is critical to ensuring our children receive the care they deserve. | Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Have you heard about the Canary Club?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Sherrod Brown - Senator from Ohio [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87645/images/brown_2018_logo-outlined.png]
Years ago at an event in Lorain, Ohio, a steelworker from Local 1104 gave me a gift -- a small, yellow canary pin.
Coal miners used to bring canaries into the mines with them to detect poisonous gas. If the bird died, they knew to clear out. They didn't have a union strong enough or a government that cared enough to protect them.
I've worn that pin on my jacket ever since, as a symbol of all we've done since then to empower working people -- and all the work we still have to do.
To me, the pin isn't just an accessory. It's a reminder of the steelworkers, miners, factory workers, and every person who puts in a hard day's labor to make this country work. No matter your background, your zip code, or what kind of work you do -- all work has dignity, and should be respected and valued.
Our movement is focused on the Dignity of all Work -- creating long-term progress for working families in Ohio and around the country. Building that kind of lasting progress requires continued activism from people like you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230218?recurring=true]
JOIN OUR CANARY CLUB WITH A MONTHLY CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230218?recurring=true]
As one of only three Democrats up for re-election in states Trump won in 2020, I’m facing one of the most competitive races in the country and I need you to stay involved from now all the way through Election Day.
This is a team effort. I’m counting on this movement of grassroots supporters to spread our Dignity of Work message to every corner of Ohio, to every voter.
So today, I'm asking you to become a part of our Canary Club -- a group of dedicated supporters who give a set amount, every month, to keep our operations going strong.
If you can, start your monthly contribution today. Committing our average online contribution of $26 or even just $5 a month will help us plan and execute our efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbe230218?recurring=true]
Together, we can build for the future by laying the groundwork now, organizing, working hard, and never giving up.
With gratitude,
Sherrod
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible.
Friends of Sherrod Brown
3867 West Market Street
Ste. 289
Akron, OH 44333
United States

name: Phil Arballo
subject: Why we gave our third grader a cell phone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arballo For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58916563/392646205/-1896005792?refcode=header-img&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRiOWI1Yy1iYmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nETvyNCZbd8wXFMyTn1BDfYAqVZcWjvnKeXKXf5wm5A=)
---
-273 in 2014
-383 in 2016
-336 in 2018
-690 in 2021
And in just the first few weeks of 2023, there have been 72 mass shootings so far.

That fact should terrify and outrage anyone.

This week, we add Michigan State alongside others like Virginia Tech, Sandy Hook, Parkland, Uvalde, and Oxford. Students and their families shouldn't have to live in fear of gun violence and they don't want to. Yet, we're being forced to because of Republican obstructionism.

**[Peter, we need change, and we need it now. We need leaders who are unafraid to tackle the gun lobbyists and their special interests. Show your support for gun reform by adding your name alongside mine, and together we'll demand change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58916564/392646206/-685846664?ms=em23_230218_gun_reform&refcode=em23_230218_gun_reform&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRiOWI1Yy1iYmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nETvyNCZbd8wXFMyTn1BDfYAqVZcWjvnKeXKXf5wm5A=&emci=a892508a-01af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a74b9b5c-bbaf-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1755436)** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58916565/392646207/-685846664?ms=em23_230218_gun_reform&refcode=em23_230218_gun_reform&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzRiOWI1Yy1iYmFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nETvyNCZbd8wXFMyTn1BDfYAqVZcWjvnKeXKXf5wm5A=&emci=a892508a-01af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a74b9b5c-bbaf-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1755436)** As a parent, I can't even begin to imagine the fear and anxiety that comes with a school shooting. But I can relate to the tough decisions we're forced to make every day because of the fear of gun violence, like having to buy a cell phone for my third grader in order to contact him in case the worst happens.

What's happening isn't normal, and it isn't okay, and that's why we need change.

**[For the last 30 years, Republicans have stood in the way of progress and common-sense time and time again. Join me and demand an end to senseless acts of gun violence. clean_body: | = -273 in 2014 -383 in 2016 -336 in 2018 -690 in 2021 And in just the first few weeks of 2023, there have been 72 mass shootings so far. That fact should terrify and outrage anyone. This week, we add Michigan State alongside others like Virginia Tech, Sandy Hook, Parkland, Uvalde, and Oxford. Students and their families shouldn't have to live in fear of gun violence and they don't want to. Yet, we're being forced to because of Republican obstructionism. As a parent, I can't even begin to imagine the fear and anxiety that comes with a school shooting. But I can relate to the tough decisions we're forced to make every day because of the fear of gun violence, like having to buy a cell phone for my third grader in order to contact him in case the worst happens. What's happening isn't normal, and it isn't okay, and that's why we need change. – Phil Arballo = = | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. body:
- - -

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/46412886aaa0/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8116619?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/infrastructure-agriculture/?utm_source=mailchimp&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230210_lcd_infrastructure&utm_content=&amount=

Peter,

As a member of the House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure and the House Committee on Agriculture, Lori is committed to advocating for our infrastructure and our farmers.

The Transportation and Infrastructure Committee has jurisdiction over all modes of transportation, including the aviation system, highways and bridges, transit and rail transportation, pipelines, and maritime transportation. Lori is fighting to ensure that our transportation and infrastructure are safe, reliable, and accessible for all.

Farmers and ranchers in the 5th District play a key role in feeding the U.S. and the world. From growing specialty crops to raising livestock like cattle, agricultural production is the core of Oregon’s rural economy. Lori is committed to supporting our farmers and ranchers and ensuring that our rural communities have the resources they need to thrive.

Lori is ready to make a real difference, but she needs your help to make it happen. Can you contribute $50, $25, or even $10 right now to support Lori’s efforts on these committees? >>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/infrastructure-agriculture/?utm_source=mailchimp&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230210_lcd_infrastructure&utm_content=&amount=)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: SIGN: Demand Pete Buttigieg put railroad workers over profits!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Take a look at this headline from The Lever this week,
Peter:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/railroad-safety-pete-petiton/?source=em20230218-27586&t=1001&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/railroad-safety-pete-petiton/?source=em20230218-27586&t=1002&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h ][IMG]

Railroad unions warned us train derailments like the one in Ohio would
happen if the railroad industry continued to operate virtually un-checked.
While workers put everything on the line to speak up and try to prevent
disasters like this, Pete Buttigieg, Secretary of Transport, is throwing
up his hands.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/railroad-safety-pete-petiton/?source=em20230218-27586&t=1003&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h ]Will you add your name right now to join us & demand Pete Buttigieg
listen to workers and frontline communities and enforce common-sense
safety regulations to prevent more disasters?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/railroad-safety-pete-petiton/?source=em20230218-27586&t=1004&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h ]Add Your Name

Pete Buttigieg claims there’s nothing he can do, purposefully misleading
the public and allowing the railroad industry off the hook yet again.
Meanwhile, millions of metric tons of toxic chemicals are spreading
through Ohio and beyond.

His behavior is nothing more than a handout to an industry that continues
to harm workers and put all of us at risk with its cost-cutting, dangerous
practices. Railroad companies like Norfolk Southern can’t be allowed to
operate in such flagrantly dangerous ways. Enough is enough.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/railroad-safety-pete-petiton/?source=em20230218-27586&t=1005&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h ]We have to seize this moment and speak up to demand Pete Buttigieg act
immediately to regulate the railroad industry — to protect workers and us
all. Will you add your name right now?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1006&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1007&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230218-27586-footer&t=1008&refcode2=27586_1203867_gIlq4h&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=27586%2E1203867%2EgIlq4h

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lucas=20Kunce?=
subject: We’re building this campaign the right way.
body:
#
Peter: When I launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate, I knew I had to run it the right way -- without a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists.
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to **[add a donation of $10 to my grassroots campaign.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=9cdb6aa7c1&e=8095450ef8) But first, will you give me a moment to explain why this commitment is so important to me?**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW»](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=82849e20b5&e=8095450ef8)**
For decades, massive corporations have turned the struggles of real everyday people into their own personal profit. Whether it's wasting trillions of dollars on pointless forever wars or price-gouging medication millions of Americans need for survival -- they've waged economic warfare on our country.
**And thanks to an army of lobbyists and millions in corporate PAC donations, the politicians who are supposed to protect us let them get away with it.**
These politicians will take money and buy stock from Big Pharma, fossil fuels, defense contractors, and so many other industries that have spent years tearing up our country. And once they're elected, that's who they'll work for in Congress.
We've watched it happen over and over. Instead of fighting for the people, corrupt DC politicians like Josh Hawley have auctioned their votes off to the highest bidder while the rest of us get left behind. **I 'm running to break that cycle.**
The only way we'll be able to fight back and fundamentally change who has power in our country is by building an unprecedented grassroots movement here in Missouri -- and with $0 from corporate PACs + $0 from federal lobbyists, we're already on our way to making it happen.
**Thanks to support from real people just like you, we 're throwing out the rulebook and running this campaign the right way** -- staying focused on calling out Hawley for being a fraud and a coward instead of pleasing a bunch of corporate elites. And our message is resonating, but we can't slow down now.
The NRSC has already proved our race is a top target in 2024, and they'll spend whatever it takes to keep Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. **That 's why I'm asking:**
**[Will you add a donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign today? Your early support will help us get our message in front of voters, stand up to the national Republicans backing Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri's U.S. Senate seat next year.](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=217f4062f3&e=8095450ef8)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=4c99759c86&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $25](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=f41f66541d&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $30](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=163fe994cb&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $50](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=1a87f2b3c2&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $100](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=c545a9782a&e=8095450ef8) [Contribute $250](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=2917f1cddd&e=8095450ef8) [Give another amount](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=0c5d2851be&e=8095450ef8)
---
I'm glad to have you on my team.
Let's do this,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=74965ef170&e=8095450ef8)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=10a32a162c&e=8095450ef8&c=e360bf4f06). Mail us: PO BOX 1240, Independence, MO 64050.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: The question I get asked the most
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Since being sworn in to the House of Representatives, I’m often asked the same question: Can anything get done in a divided Congress?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58917818/392650679/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230218-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNkM2I0Mi1jMGFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9MCJDA9RQrlwmiwl5bavIbgehZGPWc-mpBtMcF_vfI=)
---
| Team,

Since being sworn in to the House of Representatives, I’m often asked the same question: Can anything get done in a divided Congress?

**My answer is a strong _yes_ – as long as we work for it.**

It is no doubt frustrating that the bills we’ve seen from Republican leadership are more focused on messaging than on real policy, and that their messages are so clearly at odds with what the American people want.

I am looking for no-nonsense partners on the other side of the aisle, and within my own caucus as well, who are not going to play games with the budget and our deficit. I’m glad to report that there are so many of us who want nothing more than to get to work on the issues that matter most. _**[(Some of us even discussed our commitment to bipartisan progress with the Washington Post!)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58917819/392650680/1798704816?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNkM2I0Mi1jMGFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9MCJDA9RQrlwmiwl5bavIbgehZGPWc-mpBtMcF_vfI=&emci=4904e092-44ae-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=623d3b42-c0af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=750857)**_

**I am proud to be part of a freshman class in Congress that is committed to making real progress and recognizes our immense bipartisan overlap on infrastructure investments, immigration reform, and more.** [_**I’m asking you today to invest $10 or whatever you can spare to make sure I have the resources to stay in office as a bipartisan problem-solver.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58917820/392650681/205369934?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230218-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjNkM2I0Mi1jMGFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E9MCJDA9RQrlwmiwl5bavIbgehZGPWc-mpBtMcF_vfI=)

body:
help us win this historic election

|
---
Derek, There has never been a Black Woman who has represented Virginia in Congress. Jennifer McClellan will be the first. Representation matters and it's on us, and the voters in VA-04, to break that glass ceiling and send Senator McClellan to Congress on Tuesday. [**There are only three days left in this campaign — can we count on you to chip in and help us win this historic election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58921356/392673411/-1927976296?refcode=dpva-em-230218-representation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjYzNjc5My1lYWFmLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HtT1oRZaTZ4bxeJ1rOxMhkmvrJEhdt4CE-XmQ1S9liU=) The people of the 4th Congressional District deserve a representative who will fight for them. subject: My New Book is Coming Soon!
body:
It's time for an American Revival... | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7a49daa6e479/my-new-book-is-coming-soon?e=3ebdc747e6)
---
|
---
| | |
# _**Coming Soon:**_
## _Jonah Schulz hopes to inspire an American Revival with new book._
---
|
---
---
|
## Pre-Order Details Coming Next Week!
---
| Inspired by Thomas Paine's "Common Sense," this book was written with a simple yet difficult goal: to inspire the present-day American to rekindle the light of liberty within our very soul. _Common Sense for a Dying Nation_ takes a deep and direct dive into the heart of the issues plaguing our politics, government, culture, and spirit. Instead of seeking to diagnose and prescribe solutions for every public policy dispute, this work seeks to get to the root cause by first examining the nature of our God-given rights, the true meaning of liberty, and how we ought to live our lives.

While this work is written with present-day facts, the fundamentals it espouses are timeless and universal. In this brief work, we will focus on rediscovering truth and an unwavering moral center that guides a free society and a good people.
---
|
---
|
---
Jonah Schulz is an author, non-profit founder, and political activist from Cleveland, Ohio. After graduating from The University of Findlay and a short stint in independent league baseball, Jonah began his career in politics at the age of 23 as a policy advisor, ultimately launching his own congressional campaigns to restore the true voice of the common man in Washington.

Having appeared on ABC, Fox News, Politico, Real America’s Voice, the National Desk and other outlets, Jonah has worked to spread the message of liberty to all who will listen.

“My hope is that _Common Sense for a Dying Nation_ will be just a small part in the great revival of liberty within the soul of America.”
| | | | | | [](https://jonahdschulz.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fca39b236a4d3fca484c28fd6&id=987b198126&e=3ebdc747e6)
